dialogue.r: Ne, samusil ildo kkeutnasseoyo. Oneul jeongmal joeun haruyeyo.

dialogue.en: That's right. I'm happy being together with friends.
dialogue.r: Majayo. Chingudeulgwa hamkke isseoseo haengbokhaeyo.

I want to buy a shirt with a pretty color.

dialogue.en: Minji, did you move yesterday?

lessons.titleEn: What did you do this weekend?

dialogue.en: Soyeon, what did you do this weekend?
dialogue.r: Soyeon ssi, jumare mwo haesseoyo?

dialogue.en: I went to Minji's housewarming party! It was really fun.
dialogue.r: Minji jipdeuri gasseoyo! Jeongmal jaemiisseosseoyo.

dialogue.en: Oh, did you have a housewarming at the new place?

It was really fun! But it was so long.
Let's hang out together next weekend!

dialogue.en: Huh? That's weird. The delivery came, but...

dialogue.r: Markohante jwoyo. Markoneun da joahaeyo!

I need to call customer service.
Give it to Marco. Marco likes everything!

dialogue.r: Daeum jue arayo. Neomu ginjangdwaeyo.

dialogue.en: (A week later) Junho! How did it go?
dialogue.r: (Iljuil hu) Junho! Eotteoke dwaesseoyo?

dialogue.en: I passed!! I start work next week!
dialogue.r: Hapgyeokhaesseoyo!! Daeum juboteo chulgeunhaeyo!

dialogue.en: Wow, congratulations!! Is the salary good too?
dialogue.r: Wa, chukhahaeyo!! Wolgeupdo joayo?

dialogue.t: —네, 정말 좋아요! 오늘 다 같이 축하해요!
dialogue.en: Yes, really good! Let's all celebrate together today!
dialogue.lit: Yes, really good! Today all together celebrate!
dialogue.r: Ne, jeongmal joayo! Oneul da gachi chukhahaeyo!

yourTurn.en: I had a job interview today. I'm not sure how it went.

yourTurn.t: 분명히 잘했을 거예요! 언제 결과 알아요?
yourTurn.en: I'm sure you did well! When will you know the result?
I passed!! I start work next week!

dialogue.en: We're finally going to Jeju Island tomorrow!
dialogue.r: Deudieo naeil Jejudoe gal geoyeyo!

dialogue.en: I'm so excited too! Did you finish packing?
dialogue.lit: I-also too excited! Luggage all packed?
dialogue.r: Jeodo neomu seollaeyo! Jim da ssasseoyo?

dialogue.t: —네, 어제 다 쌌어요. 공항에 몇 시에 갈 거예요?
dialogue.en: Yes, finished it all yesterday. What time are we going to the airport?
dialogue.lit: Yes, yesterday all packed. Airport-to what-time-at will-go?
dialogue.r: Ne, eoje da ssasseoyo. Gonghange myeot sie gal geoyeyo?

dialogue.t: —아침 일곱 시에 갈 거예요. 비행기가 아홉 시예요.
dialogue.en: We'll go at seven in the morning. The flight is at nine.
dialogue.r: Achim ilgop sie gal geoyeyo. Bihaenggiga ahop siyeyo.

dialogue.en: I booked a window seat. I'm going to love it!
dialogue.r: Jeoneun changga jari yeyakhaesseoyo. Joahal geoyeyo!

dialogue.t: —짐 부칠 거예요? 아니면 기내용만 가져갈 거예요?
dialogue.en: Are you going to check luggage? Or just bring carry-on?
dialogue.r: Jim buchil geoyeyo? Animyeon ginaeyongman gajyeogal geoyeyo?

dialogue.t: —기내용만 가져갈 거예요. 빵 많이 가져가서 무거워요!
dialogue.en: I'll just bring carry-on. It's heavy because I'm bringing a lot of bread!
dialogue.lit: Carry-on-only will-bring. Bread a-lot bring-because heavy!
dialogue.r: Ginaeyongman gajyeogal geoyeyo. Ppang mani gajyeogaseo mugeowoyo!

dialogue.t: —마르코! 또 빵이에요?! 출국 심사 늦지 않게 가요.
dialogue.en: Marco! Bread again?! Let's not be late for departure check.
dialogue.lit: Marco! Again bread-is?! Departure inspection not-late go.
dialogue.r: Marco! Tto ppangieyo?! Chulguk simsa neutji anke gayo.

dialogue.en: Got it! What are we going to do in Jeju?
dialogue.r: Algesseoyo! Jejudoeseo mwo hal geoyeyo?

dialogue.t: —바다도 보고, 맛있는 것도 많이 먹을 거예요!
dialogue.en: We'll see the ocean, and eat lots of delicious food too!
dialogue.lit: Sea-also see, delicious thing-also a-lot will-eat!
dialogue.r: Badado bogo, masinneun geotdo mani meogeul geoyeyo!

yourTurn.en: We're finally going to Jeju Island tomorrow!
I booked a window seat. I'm going to love it!

yourTurn.t: 바다도 보고, 맛있는 것도 많이 먹을 거예요!
yourTurn.en: We'll see the ocean, and eat lots of delicious food!

dialogue.en: The sea is so beautiful! The color is so blue.
dialogue.lit: Sea really pretty! Color too blue.
dialogue.r: Bada jeongmal yeppeoyo! Saekkkari neomu parayo.

dialogue.en: Right. Are you going to swim?
dialogue.r: Majayo. Suyeonghal geoyeyo?

dialogue.t: —네! 그런데 먼저 선크림 발라야 돼요. 안 그러면 햇볕에 탈 거예요.
dialogue.en: Yes! But I need to put on sunscreen first. Otherwise I'll get sunburned.
dialogue.lit: Yes! But first sunscreen must-apply. If-not-so sunburn will-get.
dialogue.r: Ne! Geureonde meonjeo seonkeurim ballaya dwaeyo. An geureomyeon haetbyeote tal geoyeyo.

dialogue.en: True, I should put some on too. The waves are kind of strong.
dialogue.lit: Correct, I-also should-apply. Wave-subject a-bit strong.
dialogue.r: Majayo, jeodo ballayagesseoyo. Padoga jom seyo.

dialogue.en: Be careful! Where's Marco?
dialogue.r: Josimhaseyo! Markoneun eodi isseoyo?

dialogue.en: Over there, he's looking for shells in the sand.
dialogue.r: Jeogiyo, moraeeseo jogae chatgo isseoyo.

dialogue.en: Haha, that's cute! Let's swim together.
dialogue.r: Haha, gwiyeomneyo! Gachi suyeonghaeyo.

dialogue.en: Sounds good! Let's go see the sunset in the evening too.
dialogue.r: Joayo! Jeonyeogeneun noeuldo boreo gayo.

dialogue.en: It's going to be a really great day!
dialogue.r: Jeongmal joeun haruga doel geoyeyo!

yourTurn.t: 먼저 선크림 발라야 돼요. 안 그러면 햇볕에 탈 거예요.
yourTurn.en: I need to put on sunscreen first, otherwise I'll get sunburned.
He's looking for shells in the sand.
It's going to be a really great day!

dialogue.t: —제주도 여행 정말 좋았어요. 음식도 너무 맛있었어요.
dialogue.en: The Jeju trip was really nice. The food was so delicious too.
dialogue.lit: Jeju-Island trip really good-was. Food-also too tasty-was.
dialogue.r: Jejudo yeohaeng jeongmal joasseoyo. Eumsikdo neomu masisseosseoyo.

dialogue.en: Right! We even cooked together, remember?
dialogue.r: Majayo! Gachi yorido haetjanayo. Gieongnayo?

dialogue.en: Yes, it was tough because it was spicy, but it was really tasty.
dialogue.r: Ne, maewoseo himdeureotjiman jeongmal masisseosseoyo.

dialogue.en: We swam in the sea, and watched the sunset too.
dialogue.r: Badaeseo suyeongdo hago, noeuldo bwasseoyo.

dialogue.t: —마르코는 모래에서 조개 찾고 있었어요. 정말 귀여웠어요.
dialogue.en: Marco was looking for shells in the sand. It was really cute.
dialogue.lit: Marco-as-for sand-at shell looking-for was. Really cute-was.
dialogue.r: Markoneun moraeeseo jogae chatgo isseosseoyo. Jeongmal gwiyeowosseoyo.

dialogue.en: And we were a bit late at the airport because of luggage, remember!
dialogue.lit: And airport-at luggage because-of a-bit late-was-you-know!
dialogue.r: Geurigo gonghangeseo jim ttaemune jom neujeotjanayo!

dialogue.en: Right, because of Marco's bread bag! Haha.
dialogue.lit: Correct, Marco bread bag because-of-is! Haha.
dialogue.r: Majayo, Marco ppang gabang ttaemuneyo! Haha.

dialogue.en: Still, it was a really fun trip.
dialogue.r: Geuraedo jeongmal jeulgeoun yeohaengieosseoyo.

dialogue.en: We'll go on another trip together again next time!
dialogue.r: Daeume tto gachi yeohaeng gal geoyeyo!

yourTurn.t: 제주도 여행 정말 좋았어요. 음식도 너무 맛있었어요.
yourTurn.en: The Jeju trip was really nice. The food was delicious too.
It was tough because it was spicy, but it was really tasty.

yourTurn.t: 다음에 또 같이 여행 갈 거예요!
yourTurn.en: We'll go on another trip together again next time!

dialogue.t: —다음 주에 소연 씨 생일이에요. 깜짝 파티 할까요?
dialogue.en: Soyeon's birthday is next week. Should we throw a surprise party?
dialogue.lit: Next week-at Soyeon Mr/Ms birthday-is. Surprise party shall-do?
dialogue.r: Daeum jue Soyeon ssi saengirieyo. Kkamjjak pati halkkayo?

dialogue.en: Great idea! But there's a lot to prepare.
dialogue.lit: Good idea-is! But will-prepare thing a-lot.
dialogue.r: Joeun saenggagieyo! Geureonde junbihal ge manayo.

dialogue.t: —친구들 다 초대해야 돼요. 케이크도 사야 되고요.
dialogue.en: We need to invite all our friends. And we have to buy a cake too.
dialogue.r: Chingudeul da chodaehaeya dwaeyo. Keikeudo saya doegoyo.

dialogue.en: I'll make the cake! I'll prepare balloons too.
dialogue.r: Jega keikeu mandeulgeyo! Pungseondo junbihalgeyo.

dialogue.en: What would be a good gift?
dialogue.r: Seonmureun mwoga joeulkkayo?

dialogue.en: Soyeon said she needs a new bag.
dialogue.r: Soyeon ssiga sae gabang piryohadago haesseoyo.

dialogue.t: —좋아요! 그런데 비밀 지킬 수 있어요? 절대 말하면 안 돼요.
dialogue.en: Good! But can you keep a secret? You absolutely can't tell her.
dialogue.lit: Good! But secret can-keep? Absolutely if-tell not-okay.
dialogue.r: Joayo! Geureonde bimil jikil su isseoyo? Jeoldae malhamyeon an dwaeyo.

dialogue.en: Of course! Does Marco know too?
dialogue.r: Geureomyo! Markodo arayo?

dialogue.t: —아니요, 마르코는 말이 많아서 아직 말 안 했어요!
dialogue.en: No, Marco talks a lot so we haven't told him yet!
dialogue.lit: No, Marco-as-for talk a-lot-because yet word not-told!
dialogue.r: Aniyo, Markoneun mari manaseo ajik mal an haesseoyo!

yourTurn.t: 다음 주에 소연 씨 생일이에요. 깜짝 파티 할까요?
yourTurn.en: Soyeon's birthday is next week. Should we throw a surprise party?

yourTurn.t: 소연 씨가 새 가방 필요하다고 했어요.
yourTurn.en: Soyeon said she needs a new bag.

yourTurn.t: 비밀 지킬 수 있어요? 절대 말하면 안 돼요.
yourTurn.en: Can you keep a secret? You absolutely can't tell her.

dialogue.en: How's this bag shop? The designs are varied.
dialogue.lit: This bag shop how? Design-subject various.
dialogue.r: I gabang gage eottaeyo? Dijaini dayanghaeyo.

dialogue.en: Good! But what's our budget?
dialogue.r: Joayo! Geureonde yesani eolmayeyo?

dialogue.en: I was thinking around fifty euros.
dialogue.r: Osip yuro jeongdo saenggakhaesseoyo.

dialogue.t: —이 가방 어때요? 색깔도 예쁘고 가격도 괜찮아요.
dialogue.en: How about this bag? The color is pretty and the price is okay too.
dialogue.lit: This bag how? Color-also pretty-and price-also okay.
dialogue.r: I gabang eottaeyo? Saekkkaldo yeppeugo gagyeokdo gwaenchanayo.

dialogue.en: Perfect! Let's pick this one.
dialogue.r: Wanbyeokhaeyo! Igeollo gollayo.

dialogue.en: Please wrap it. And please add a ribbon too.
dialogue.r: Pojanghae juseyo. Geurigo ribondo dara juseyo.

dialogue.en: Yes, of course. Shall I include a card too?
dialogue.lit: Yes, understood. Card-also together put-in shall-give?
dialogue.r: Ne, algesseumnida. Kadeudo gachi neoeo deurilkkayo?

dialogue.en: Yes, great. I'll write the card.
dialogue.r: Ne, joayo. Kadeuneun jega sseulgeyo.

dialogue.en: Now everything's ready. I'm looking forward to tomorrow's party!
dialogue.lit: Now all prepared. Tomorrow party-subject anticipated!
dialogue.r: Ije da junbidwaesseoyo. Naeil patiga gidaedwaeyo!

yourTurn.t: 이 가방 어때요? 색깔도 예쁘고 가격도 괜찮아요.
yourTurn.en: How about this bag? The color is pretty and the price is okay too.

yourTurn.t: 포장해 주세요. 그리고 리본도 달아 주세요.
yourTurn.en: Please wrap it, and please add a ribbon too.
I'm looking forward to tomorrow's party!

dialogue.en: Everyone be quiet! Soyeon's coming!
dialogue.lit: Everyone quietly do! Soyeon Mr/Ms-subject comes!
dialogue.r: Dadeul joyonghi haeyo! Soyeon ssiga wayo!

dialogue.en: Happy birthday!! Surprise!!
dialogue.r: Saengil chukhahamnida!! Seopeuraijeu!!

dialogue.en: Oh my god, I'm so surprised! I'm so touched...
dialogue.r: Sesange, jeongmal nollasseoyo! Neomu gamdonghaesseoyo...

dialogue.en: Happy birthday! Blow out the candles quickly.
dialogue.r: Saengil chukhahaeyo! Ppalli chotbul kkeoyo.

dialogue.t: —소원도 빌어야 돼요! 무슨 소원 빌 거예요?
dialogue.en: You have to make a wish too! What wish will you make?
dialogue.r: Sowondo bireoya dwaeyo! Museun sowon bil geoyeyo?

dialogue.en: Hmm... it's a secret! Let's all sing together.
dialogue.lit: Um... secret-is! All together song sing.
dialogue.r: Eum... bimirieyo! Da gachi norae bulleoyo.

dialogue.en: Happy birthday to you, happy birthday to you!
dialogue.r: Saengil chukhahamnida, saengil chukhahamnida!

dialogue.en: This is a gift! Open it.
dialogue.r: Igeo seonmurieyo! Yeoreo boseyo.

dialogue.en: Wow, it's a bag! It's exactly what I needed!
dialogue.r: Wa, gabangieyo! Jega piryohaetdeon geoyeyo!

dialogue.t: —건배해요! 오늘 밤을 즐겨요. 좋은 추억이 될 거예요.
dialogue.en: Let's toast! Let's enjoy tonight. It'll become a good memory.
dialogue.lit: Let's-toast! Today night-object enjoy. Good memory-subject will-become.
dialogue.r: Geonbaehaeyo! Oneul bameul jeulgyeoyo. Joeun chueogi doel geoyeyo.

yourTurn.en: Happy birthday!! Surprise!!
I'm so surprised! I'm so touched...
It's exactly what I needed!

dialogue.t: —어제 파티 정말 재미있었지만 지금 너무 피곤해요.
dialogue.en: Yesterday's party was really fun, but I'm so tired now.
dialogue.lit: Yesterday party really fun-was-but now too tired.
dialogue.r: Eoje pati jeongmal jaemiisseotjiman jigeum neomu pigonhaeyo.

dialogue.en: Me too. But we need to clean up first.
dialogue.r: Jeodoyo. Geureonde cheongsobuteo haeya dwaeyo.

dialogue.en: I'll do the dishes. Junho, will you take out the trash?
dialogue.r: Jega seolgeojihalgeyo. Junhoneun sseuregi beoryeo jullaeyo?

dialogue.t: —그럼요. 그런데 이 사진들 봤어요? 너무 웃겨요!
dialogue.en: Sure. But did you see these photos? They're so funny!
dialogue.lit: Of-course. But this photos saw? Too funny!
dialogue.r: Geureomyo. Geureonde i sajindeul bwasseoyo? Neomu utgyeoyo!

dialogue.t: —하하, 마르코 사진이에요! 케이크 다 먹고 있어요.
dialogue.en: Haha, it's a photo of Marco! He's eating all the cake.
dialogue.lit: Haha, Marco photo-is! Cake all eating is.
dialogue.r: Haha, Marco sajinieyo! Keikeu da meokgo isseoyo.

dialogue.t: —진짜 마르코답네요! 그래도 정말 좋은 추억을 남겼어요.
dialogue.en: That's so very Marco! Still, we made some really good memories.
dialogue.lit: Really Marco-like! Even-so really good memory-object left.
dialogue.r: Jinjja Markodamneyo! Geuraedo jeongmal joeun chueogeul namgyeosseoyo.

dialogue.en: Right. Let's rest a bit once we finish cleaning.
dialogue.r: Majayo. Cheongso kkeunnamyeon jom swieoyo.

dialogue.t: —네, 그런데 기분은 정말 좋아요. 좋은 사람들이 있어서요.
dialogue.en: Yes, but I feel really good. Because I have good people around me.
dialogue.lit: Yes, but mood-as-for really good. Good people-subject is-because.
dialogue.r: Ne, geureonde gibuneun jeongmal joayo. Joeun saramdeuri isseoseoyo.

yourTurn.t: 어제 파티 정말 재미있었지만 지금 너무 피곤해요.
yourTurn.en: Yesterday's party was really fun, but I'm so tired now.

yourTurn.t: 진짜 마르코답네요! 케이크 다 먹고 있어요.
yourTurn.en: That's so very Marco! He's eating all the cake.

yourTurn.t: 기분은 정말 좋아요. 좋은 사람들이 있어서요.
yourTurn.en: I feel really good because I have good people around me.

dialogue.en: Junho, are you still going to the gym consistently these days?
dialogue.r: Junho, yojeumdo helseujang kkujunhi gayo?

dialogue.en: Yes! I decided to exercise every day starting from the new year.
dialogue.r: Ne! Saehaeboteo maeil undonghagiro haesseoyo.

dialogue.en: Wow, impressive! What's your goal?
dialogue.r: Wa, daedanhaeyo! Mokpyoga mwoyeyo?

dialogue.t: —체력을 키우고 싶어요. 그리고 근육도 좀 만들고 싶어요.
dialogue.en: I want to build up my stamina. And build a bit of muscle too.
dialogue.lit: Stamina-object want-to-grow. And muscle-also a-bit want-to-make.
dialogue.r: Cheryeogeul kiugo sipeoyo. Geurigo geunyukdo jom mandeulgo sipeoyo.

dialogue.en: Building a habit isn't easy, but you're doing great!
dialogue.lit: Habit making easy not-but, well-doing is!
dialogue.r: Seupgwan mandeulgi swipji anchiman, jalhago isseoyo!

dialogue.en: Thanks. Sometimes it's so hard that I want to give up.
dialogue.r: Gomawoyo. Gakkeum neomu himdeureoseo pogihago sipeoyo.

dialogue.en: Don't give up! It'll get better little by little.
dialogue.r: Pogihaji maseyo! Jogeumssik naajil geoyeyo.

dialogue.en: True. And I'm planning to start running too.
dialogue.r: Majayo. Geurigo dalligido sijakharyeogo haeyo.

dialogue.en: Great idea! I'll join you too.
dialogue.r: Joeun saenggagieyo! Jeodo gachi halgeyo.

yourTurn.en: I decided to exercise every day starting from the new year.
Don't give up! It'll get better little by little.
I'm planning to start running too.

dialogue.en: Soyeon, how's work these days?
dialogue.r: Soyeon ssi, yojeum hoesa eottaeyo?

dialogue.en: I started a new project. But it's a bit difficult.
dialogue.lit: New project started. But a-bit difficult.
dialogue.r: Sae peurojekteu sijakhaesseoyo. Geureonde jom eoryeowoyo.

dialogue.en: What kind of project is it?
dialogue.r: Museun peurojekteuyeyo?

dialogue.t: —팀이랑 같이 새 아이디어 발표해야 돼요. 다음 주 금요일에요.
dialogue.en: I have to present a new idea with my team. It's next Friday.
dialogue.lit: Team-with together new idea must-present. Next week Friday-is.
dialogue.r: Timirang gachi sae aidieo balpyohaeya dwaeyo. Daeum ju geumyoirieyo.

dialogue.en: Are you nervous?
dialogue.r: Ginjangdwaeyo?

dialogue.t: —조금요. 그런데 자신 있어요! 요즘 매일 야근하면서 준비하고 있어요.
dialogue.en: A little. But I'm confident! I've been preparing while working overtime every day lately.
dialogue.lit: A-little-is. But confidence is! These-days every-day overtime-working-while preparing is.
dialogue.r: Jogeumyo. Geureonde jasin isseoyo! Yojeum maeil yageunhamyeonseo junbihago isseoyo.

dialogue.t: —와, 정말 열심히 하네요! 분명히 성공할 거예요.
dialogue.en: Wow, you're working so hard! I'm sure it'll be a success.
dialogue.lit: Wow, really diligently doing! Surely will-succeed.
dialogue.r: Wa, jeongmal yeolsimhi haneyo! Bunmyeonghi seonggonghal geoyeyo.

dialogue.en: Thanks! Your support really gives me strength.
dialogue.r: Gomawoyo! Eungwonhae jwoseo jeongmal himi nayo.

dialogue.t: —발표 끝나면 우리가 축하 파티 열어 줄게요!
dialogue.en: Once the presentation is over, we'll throw you a celebration party!
dialogue.lit: Presentation if-finish we-subject celebration party will-open-give!
dialogue.r: Balpyo kkeunnamyeon uriga chukha pati yeoreo julgeyo!

yourTurn.t: 새 프로젝트 시작했어요. 그런데 좀 어려워요.
yourTurn.en: I started a new project, but it's a bit difficult.
I'm confident! I've been preparing while working overtime.

yourTurn.t: 발표 끝나면 우리가 축하 파티 열어 줄게요!
yourTurn.en: Once the presentation is over, we'll throw you a party!

dialogue.t: —요즘 정말 많은 일이 있었지만, 다 좋은 일이었어요.
dialogue.en: There's been so much happening lately, but it's all been good.
dialogue.lit: These-days really many things-subject were-but, all good things-were.
dialogue.r: Yojeum jeongmal maneun iri isseotjiman, da joeun irieosseoyo.

dialogue.t: —맞아요. 소연 씨 생일 파티도 정말 즐거웠어요.
dialogue.en: Right. Soyeon's birthday party was really fun too.
dialogue.lit: Correct. Soyeon Mr/Ms birthday party-also really fun-was.
dialogue.r: Majayo. Soyeon ssi saengil patido jeongmal jeulgeowosseoyo.

dialogue.t: —마르코가 케이크 다 먹어서 다음 날 다 같이 웃었잖아요!
dialogue.en: Marco ate all the cake so we all laughed about it the next day, remember!
dialogue.lit: Marco-subject cake all ate-because next day all together laughed-you-know!
dialogue.r: Markoga keikeu da meogeoseo daeum nal da gachi useotjanayo!

dialogue.t: —하하, 정말 마르코답죠. 그리고 준호는 운동 목표도 세웠어요.
dialogue.en: Haha, so very Marco. And Junho also set a fitness goal.
dialogue.lit: Haha, really Marco-like-right. And Junho-as-for exercise goal-also set.
dialogue.r: Haha, jeongmal Markodapjyo. Geurigo Junhoneun undong mokpyodo sewosseoyo.

dialogue.t: —네, 포기하지 않고 꾸준히 하고 있어요. 정말 대단해요.
dialogue.en: Yes, he's keeping at it consistently without giving up. Really impressive.
dialogue.lit: Yes, not-giving-up consistently doing is. Really impressive.
dialogue.r: Ne, pogihaji anko kkujunhi hago isseoyo. Jeongmal daedanhaeyo.

dialogue.t: —그리고 소연 씨는 곧 큰 발표가 있어요. 응원해야 돼요!
dialogue.en: And Soyeon has a big presentation coming up soon. We should cheer her on!
dialogue.lit: And Soyeon Mr/Ms-as-for soon big presentation-subject is. Must-cheer!
dialogue.r: Geurigo Soyeon ssineun got keun balpyoga isseoyo. Eungwonhaeya dwaeyo!

dialogue.en: Right. Once the presentation's over, let's celebrate together again.
dialogue.lit: Correct. Presentation if-finish again together celebrate.
dialogue.r: Majayo. Balpyo kkeunnamyeon tto gachi chukhahaeyo.

dialogue.en: We're really good friends. I'm happy being together with everyone.
dialogue.lit: We really good friends-are. Together-being-because happy.
dialogue.r: Uri jeongmal joeun chingudeurieyo. Hamkkehaeseo haengbokhaeyo.

dialogue.en: Me too. Let's keep living like this going forward!
dialogue.r: Jeodoyo. Apeurodo gyesok ireoke jinaeyo!

yourTurn.t: 요즘 정말 많은 일이 있었지만, 다 좋은 일이었어요.
yourTurn.en: There's been so much happening lately, but it's all been good.
We should cheer her on!

yourTurn.t: 우리 정말 좋은 친구들이에요. 함께해서 행복해요.
yourTurn.en: We're really good friends. I'm happy being together.

dialogue.en: Soyeon! How was the presentation?
dialogue.r: Soyeon ssi! Balpyo eottaesseoyo?

dialogue.en: It was a success! Everyone applauded!
dialogue.r: Seonggonghaesseoyo! Dadeul baksureul chyeosseoyo!

dialogue.en: Wow, really?! That's so great!
dialogue.r: Wa, jeongmallyo?! Neomu jaldwaesseoyo!

dialogue.t: —네, 발표 끝나고 긴장이 다 풀렸어요. 팀장님한테 칭찬도 받았어요.
dialogue.en: Yes, after the presentation all my nervousness melted away. I got praised by my team leader too.
dialogue.lit: Yes, presentation finish-and nervousness all loosened. Team-leader-from praise-also received.
dialogue.r: Ne, balpyo kkeunnago ginjangi da pulryeosseoyo. Timjangnimhante chingchando badasseoyo.

dialogue.en: That's really amazing! It must have felt rewarding.
dialogue.r: Jeongmal daedanhaeyo! Boramisseotgesseoyo.

dialogue.t: —네, 우리 팀워크가 정말 좋았어요. 다 같이 열심히 했어요.
dialogue.en: Yes, our teamwork was really great. We all worked hard together.
dialogue.lit: Yes, our teamwork-subject really good-was. All together diligently did.
dialogue.r: Ne, uri timwokeuga jeongmal joasseoyo. Da gachi yeolsimhi haesseoyo.

dialogue.en: Could you maybe even get a promotion?
dialogue.r: Hoksi seungjinhal sudo isseoyo?

dialogue.t: —잘 모르겠어요. 그런데 오늘은 일단 제가 한턱낼게요!
dialogue.en: I'm not sure. But for now, today I'm treating everyone!
dialogue.lit: Well don't-know. But today-as-for for-now I will-treat!
dialogue.r: Jal moreugesseoyo. Geureonde oneureun ildan jega hanteoknaelgeyo!

dialogue.en: You're the best! Where should we go?
dialogue.r: Choegoyeyo! Eodiro galkkayo?

yourTurn.en: It was a success! Everyone applauded!
All my nervousness melted away, and I got praised too.
Today I'm treating everyone! Where should we go?

dialogue.en: What movie are we going to watch today?
dialogue.r: Oneul museun yeonghwa bol geoyeyo?

dialogue.en: The newly released one. The reviews are really good.
dialogue.lit: Newly came-out movie-is. Review-subject really good.
dialogue.r: Saero naon yeonghwayo. Pyeongi jeongmal joayo.

dialogue.t: —팝콘 사야 돼요! 마르코, 뭐 먹고 싶어요?
dialogue.en: We need to buy popcorn! Marco, what do you want to eat?
dialogue.r: Papkon saya dwaeyo! Marco, mwo meokgo sipeoyo?

dialogue.en: Everything, obviously! Give me popcorn and hot dogs, all of it.
dialogue.lit: Naturally everything! Popcorn-and hotdog-and all give-please.
dialogue.r: Dangyeonhi dayo! Papkoniran hatdogeurang da juseyo.

dialogue.en: Haha, classic Marco! Are there subtitles?
dialogue.r: Haha, yeoksi Markoyeyo! Jamak isseoyo?

dialogue.t: —네, 있어요. 그런데 결말 절대 말하지 마세요! 스포일러 싫어요.
dialogue.en: Yes, there are. But please never tell me the ending! I hate spoilers.
dialogue.lit: Yes, is. But ending absolutely don't-tell-please! Spoiler dislike.
dialogue.r: Ne, isseoyo. Geureonde gyeolmal jeoldae malhaji maseyo! Seupoilleo silheoyo.

dialogue.t: —걱정하지 마세요! (영화 후) 와, 주인공 정말 멋있었어요!
dialogue.en: Don't worry! (After the movie) Wow, the main character was so cool!
dialogue.lit: Don't-worry-please! (Movie after) Wow, main-character really cool-was!
dialogue.r: Geokjeonghaji maseyo! (Yeonghwa hu) Wa, juingong jeongmal meosisseosseoyo!

dialogue.t: —맞아요. 결말이 정말 감동적이었어요. 저 좀 울었어요.
dialogue.en: Right. The ending was really moving. I cried a little.
dialogue.lit: Correct. Ending-subject really moving-was. I a-bit cried.
dialogue.r: Majayo. Gyeolmari jeongmal gamdongjeogieosseoyo. Jeo jom ureosseoyo.

dialogue.en: Me too! Let's come to the movies together again next time.
dialogue.lit: Me-too! Next-time again movie-theater together come.
dialogue.r: Jeodoyo! Daeume tto yeonghwagwan gachi wayo.

yourTurn.t: 팝콘 사야 돼요! 뭐 먹고 싶어요?
yourTurn.en: We need to buy popcorn! What do you want to eat?

yourTurn.t: 결말 절대 말하지 마세요! 스포일러 싫어요.
yourTurn.en: Please never tell me the ending! I hate spoilers.

yourTurn.t: 결말이 정말 감동적이었어요. 저 좀 울었어요.
yourTurn.en: The ending was really moving. I cried a little.

dialogue.t: —얘들아, 할 말이 있어요. 다음 달에 고향으로 돌아가요.
dialogue.en: Guys, I have something to tell you. I'm going back to my hometown next month.
dialogue.lit: Friends, will-say word is. Next month-at hometown-to return.
dialogue.r: Yaedeura, hal mari isseoyo. Daeum dare gohyangeuro dorawayo.

dialogue.en: What?! Why so suddenly?
dialogue.r: Ne?! Gapjagi waeyo?

dialogue.t: —계약이 끝났어요. 그리고 가족도 너무 보고 싶어요.
dialogue.en: My contract ended. And I really miss my family too.
dialogue.lit: Contract-subject finished. And family-also too see-want.
dialogue.r: Gyeyagi kkeutnasseoyo. Geurigo gajokdo neomu bogo sipeoyo.

dialogue.en: I understand. But I'm really going to miss you.
dialogue.r: Ihaehaeyo. Geureonde jeongmal geuriul geoyeyo.

dialogue.en: Me too. Marco, did you already book the plane ticket?
dialogue.r: Jeodoyo. Marco, bihaenggipyo beolsseo kkeuneosseoyo?

dialogue.t: —네, 다음 달 십오 일이에요. 마지막 두 주 같이 잘 보내요.
dialogue.en: Yes, it's the 15th of next month. Let's spend the last two weeks well together.
dialogue.lit: Yes, next month 15th-day-is. Last two weeks together well spend.
dialogue.r: Ne, daeum dal sibo irieyo. Majimak du ju gachi jal bonaeyo.

dialogue.en: Right. Our time together was really precious.
dialogue.lit: So. We together-did time really precious-was.
dialogue.r: Geuraeyo. Uri hamkkehan sigan jeongmal sojunghaesseoyo.

dialogue.en: Let's keep in touch. And let's definitely meet again.
dialogue.lit: Continuously contact. And definitely again meet.
dialogue.r: Gyesok yeollakhaeyo. Geurigo kkok dasi mannayo.

dialogue.t: —네, 약속해요! 마지막 두 주, 좋은 추억 많이 만들어요.
dialogue.en: Yes, I promise! Let's make a lot of good memories these last two weeks.
dialogue.lit: Yes, promise! Last two weeks, good memory a-lot let's-make.
dialogue.r: Ne, yaksokhaeyo! Majimak du ju, joeun chueok mani mandeureoyo.

yourTurn.t: 할 말이 있어요. 다음 달에 고향으로 돌아가요.
yourTurn.en: I have something to tell you. I'm going back to my hometown next month.
I'm really going to miss you.

yourTurn.t: 계속 연락해요. 그리고 꼭 다시 만나요.
yourTurn.en: Let's keep in touch, and let's definitely meet again.

dialogue.en: Is everything ready for Marco's farewell party?
dialogue.r: Marco songbyeolhoe junbi da dwaesseoyo?

dialogue.en: Almost! Soyeon is preparing the food.
dialogue.lit: Almost-is! Soyeon Mr/Ms-subject food-object preparing is.
dialogue.r: Geoiyo! Soyeon ssiga eumsigeul junbihago isseoyo.

dialogue.t: —저는 같이 찍은 사진 다 모았어요. 앨범 만들 거예요.
dialogue.en: I gathered all the photos we took together. I'm going to make an album.
dialogue.lit: I-as-for together took photo all gathered. Album will-make.
dialogue.r: Jeoneun gachi jjigeun sajin da moassseoyo. Aelbeom mandeul geoyeyo.

dialogue.en: What a lovely idea! It warms my heart.
dialogue.r: Jeongmal joeun saenggagieyo! Maeumi ttatteuthaejineyo.

dialogue.en: I wrote a letter too. I wanted to express my thanks.
dialogue.r: Jeoneun pyeonjido sseosseoyo. Gomapdago jeonhago sipeosseoyo.

dialogue.t: —저도 한 장 썼어요! 마르코가 울 거예요.
dialogue.en: I wrote one too! Marco's going to cry.
dialogue.lit: I-also one sheet wrote! Marco-subject will-cry.
dialogue.r: Jeodo han jang sseosseoyo! Markoga ul geoyeyo.

dialogue.t: —하하, 분명히 울 거예요. 그런데 다시 모일 거라고 약속했잖아요.
dialogue.en: Haha, he definitely will. But we promised we'd gather again, remember.
dialogue.lit: Haha, surely will-cry. But again will-gather-that promised-you-know.
dialogue.r: Haha, bunmyeonghi ul geoyeyo. Geureonde dasi moil georago yaksokhaetjanayo.

dialogue.en: Right! So it's sad, but let's not be too sad.
dialogue.r: Majayo! Geureonikka seulpeujiman neomu seulpeohaji marayo.

dialogue.en: Right, let's just spend today having fun!
dialogue.r: Geuraeyo, oneureun geunyang jeulgeopge bonaeyo!

yourTurn.t: 같이 찍은 사진 다 모았어요. 앨범 만들 거예요.
yourTurn.en: I gathered all the photos we took together. I'm making an album.

yourTurn.t: 저도 편지를 썼어요. 고맙다고 전하고 싶었어요.
yourTurn.en: I wrote a letter too. I wanted to express my thanks.

yourTurn.t: 슬프지만 너무 슬퍼하지 말아요. 오늘은 그냥 즐겁게 보내요!
yourTurn.en: It's sad, but let's not be too sad. Let's just have fun today!

dialogue.t: —드디어 출발 날이에요. 시간이 너무 빨리 갔어요.
dialogue.en: Finally, it's departure day. Time went by so fast.
dialogue.lit: Finally departure day-is. Time-subject too fast went.
dialogue.r: Deudieo chulbal narieyo. Sigani neomu ppalli gasseoyo.

dialogue.t: —맞아요. 처음 만났을 때 기억나요? 정말 오래전 같아요.
dialogue.en: Right. Do you remember when we first met? It feels like so long ago.
dialogue.lit: Correct. First met-time remember? Really long-ago seems.
dialogue.r: Majayo. Cheoeum mannasseul ttae gieongnayo? Jeongmal oraejeon gatayo.

dialogue.t: —그럼요! 그때 빵 너무 많이 먹어서 민지가 화났었잖아요.
dialogue.en: Of course! Back then Minji got mad because I ate too much bread, remember!
dialogue.lit: Of-course! That-time bread too a-lot ate-because Minji-subject was-angry-you-know!
dialogue.r: Geureomyo! Geuttae ppang neomu mani meogeoseo Minjiga hwanasseotjanayo.

dialogue.t: —하하, 맞아요! 그런데 그게 다 좋은 추억이 됐어요.
dialogue.en: Haha, true! But it all became a good memory.
dialogue.lit: Haha, correct! But that all good memory-subject became.
dialogue.r: Haha, majayo! Geureonde geuge da joeun chueogi dwaesseoyo.

dialogue.t: —여러분 모두 정말 고마웠어요. 절대 잊지 않을 거예요.
dialogue.en: Thank you all so much, everyone. I'll never forget you.
dialogue.lit: Everyone all really was-thankful. Absolutely will-not-forget.
dialogue.r: Yeoreobun modu jeongmal gomawosseoyo. Jeoldae itji aneul geoyeyo.

dialogue.en: Us too. Marco, stay healthy and take care even after you go.
dialogue.lit: We-also. Marco, go-even-after healthily well spend.
dialogue.r: Urido. Marco, gaseodo geonganghage jal jinaeyo.

dialogue.en: It's boarding time. Let's all hug one last time.
dialogue.lit: Boarding time-is. Lastly all together hug.
dialogue.r: Tapseung siganieyo. Majimageuro da gachi anayo.

dialogue.en: (While hugging) Tears are coming... but they're happy tears.
dialogue.r: (Pongha-myeo) Nunmuri nayo... Geureonde haengbokhan nunmurieyo.

dialogue.en: Keep your promise. Let's definitely meet again!
dialogue.lit: Promise keep. We definitely again meet!
dialogue.r: Yaksok jikyeoyo. Uri kkok dasi mannayo!

dialogue.t: —네, 약속해요! 이건 끝이 아니에요. 새로운 시작이에요. 또 만나요!
dialogue.en: Yes, I promise! This isn't an ending. It's a new beginning. See you again!
dialogue.lit: Yes, promise! This end not-is. New beginning-is. Again see!
dialogue.r: Ne, yaksokhaeyo! Igeon kkeuchi anieyo. Saeroun sijagieyo. Tto mannayo!

yourTurn.t: 처음 만났을 때 기억나요? 정말 오래전 같아요.
yourTurn.en: Do you remember when we first met? It feels like so long ago.

yourTurn.t: 여러분 모두 정말 고마웠어요. 절대 잊지 않을 거예요.
yourTurn.en: Thank you all so much. I'll never forget you.

yourTurn.t: 이건 끝이 아니에요. 새로운 시작이에요. 또 만나요!
yourTurn.en: This isn't an ending. It's a new beginning. See you again!

dialogue.en: Hello? Marco, can you hear me?
dialogue.r: Yeoboseyo? Marco, deullyeoyo?

dialogue.en: Yes, I can hear you! I can see the video call screen too.
dialogue.lit: Yes, audible! Video call screen-also visible.
dialogue.r: Ne, deullyeoyo! Yeongsang tonghwa hwamyeondo boyeoyo.

dialogue.t: —신호가 좀 안 좋아요. 그래도 보여서 좋아요.
dialogue.en: The signal's a bit bad. But it's good that I can see you anyway.
dialogue.lit: Signal-subject a-bit not good. Still see-so good.
dialogue.r: Sinhoga jom an joayo. Geuraedo boyeoseo joayo.

dialogue.en: How's Italy? Did you arrive okay?
dialogue.r: Italrineun eottaeyo? Jal dochakhaesseoyo?

dialogue.t: —네, 잘 도착했어요. 그런데 여기 빵이 한국 빵하고 달라요.
dialogue.en: Yes, I arrived fine. But the bread here is different from Korean bread.
dialogue.lit: Yes, well arrived. But here bread-subject Korea bread-with different.
dialogue.r: Ne, jal dochakhaesseoyo. Geureonde yeogi ppangi Hanguk ppanghago dallayo.

dialogue.t: —하하, 역시 빵 얘기부터 하네요! 다 보고 싶었어요.
dialogue.en: Haha, of course you start with bread! I missed all of you so much.
dialogue.lit: Haha, as-expected bread talk-from do! All see-want-was.
dialogue.r: Haha, yeoksi ppang yaegibuteo haneyo! Da bogo sipeosseoyo.

dialogue.en: I miss you too. Is the puppy, Bbang, doing well?
dialogue.lit: I-also miss. Puppy Bbang-as-for well spending?
dialogue.r: Jeodo geuriwoyo. Gangaji Ppangineun jal jinaeyo?

dialogue.t: —네, 잘 지내요! 마르코 사진 보면 짖어요.
dialogue.en: Yes, doing well! He barks whenever he sees your photo.
dialogue.lit: Yes, well spending! Marco photo if-sees barks.
dialogue.r: Ne, jal jinaeyo! Marco sajin bomyeon jijeoyo.

dialogue.t: —하하, 빵이도 저 그리운가 봐요. 다음 주에 또 통화해요!
dialogue.en: Haha, looks like Bbang misses me too. Let's video call again next week!
dialogue.lit: Haha, Bbang-also me missing-seems. Next week-at again call!
dialogue.r: Haha, ppangido jeo geuriungaboayo. Daeum jue tto tonghwahaeyo!

dialogue.en: Yes, for sure! Sleep well, Marco.
dialogue.r: Ne, kkogiyo! Jal jayo, Marco.

yourTurn.en: Hello? Marco, can you hear me?
Did you arrive okay? I missed all of you.
Let's video call again next week!

dialogue.en: Soyeon, why does your face look so bright?
dialogue.lit: Soyeon Mr/Ms, face-subject why this-way bright?
dialogue.r: Soyeon ssi, eolguri wae ireoke balgayo?

dialogue.en: I got promoted! I'm a team leader now.
dialogue.r: Jeo seungjinhaesseoyo! Ije timjangieyo.

dialogue.t: —와, 정말요? 축하해요! 그동안 정말 열심히 했잖아요.
dialogue.en: Wow, really? Congratulations! You've worked so hard all this time, you know.
dialogue.lit: Wow, really? Congratulate! That-while really diligently did-you-know.
dialogue.r: Wa, jeongmallyo? Chukhahaeyo! Geudongan jeongmal yeolsimhi haetjanayo.

dialogue.en: Thanks! But the responsibility got bigger too.
dialogue.r: Gomawoyo! Geureonde chaegimdo deo manajyeosseoyo.

dialogue.en: Did your salary go up too?
dialogue.r: Wolgeupdo olrasseoyo?

dialogue.en: Yes, a little! So today I'll treat everyone.
dialogue.lit: Yes, a-little! So today I will-treat.
dialogue.r: Ne, jogeumyo! Geuraeseo oneul jega hanteoknaelgeyo.

dialogue.t: —진짜요? 저는 그럼 제일 비싼 거 먹을래요!
dialogue.en: Really? Then I'll eat the most expensive thing!
dialogue.lit: Really? I-as-for then most expensive thing will-eat!
dialogue.r: Jinjjayo? Jeoneun geureom jeil bissan geo meogeullaeyo!

dialogue.en: Haha, go ahead! I'm really proud of you, Soyeon.
dialogue.lit: Haha, so-do! Really proud, Soyeon Mr/Ms.
dialogue.r: Haha, geuraeyo! Jeongmal jarangseureowoyo, Soyeon ssi.

dialogue.en: Thank you. I'll work even harder going forward.
dialogue.r: Gomawoyo. Apeuro deo noryeokhal geoyeyo.

dialogue.en: Tell Marco too! He'll definitely be happy.
dialogue.r: Markohantedo allyeojwoyo! Bunmyeong joahal geoyeyo.

yourTurn.en: I got promoted! I'm a team leader now.
Congratulations! You've worked so hard.
I'm really proud of you.

dialogue.en: Is this the famous good restaurant? There are so many people!
dialogue.lit: Here-subject that good-restaurant-is? People-subject really many!
dialogue.r: Yeogiga geu matjibieyo? Sarami jeongmal manayo!

dialogue.en: Yes, we have a reserved table. Come this way.
dialogue.r: Ne, yeyakseok isseoyo. Ijjogeuro oseyo.

dialogue.en: The smell of meat is so good! Grill it quickly!
dialogue.lit: Meat smell too good! Quickly grill!
dialogue.r: Gogi naemsae neomu joayo! Ppalli guwoyo!

dialogue.en: If Marco were here, he'd have liked it the most.
dialogue.r: Markoga isseosseumyeon jeil joahaesseul geoyeyo.

dialogue.en: Right. Let's take a photo and send it.
dialogue.r: Majayo. Sajin jjigeoseo bonaeyo.

dialogue.t: —자, 다 같이 건배해요! 소연 씨 승진 축하해요!
dialogue.en: Okay, let's all toast together! Congratulations on your promotion, Soyeon!
dialogue.lit: Now, all together toast! Soyeon Mr/Ms promotion congratulate!
dialogue.r: Ja, da gachi geonbaehaeyo! Soyeon ssi seungjin chukhahaeyo!

dialogue.en: Cheers! Thank you, everyone!
dialogue.r: Geonbae! Gomawoyo, yeoreobun!

dialogue.t: —고기 진짜 맛있어요. 그런데 너무 많아요. 남기지 마세요!
dialogue.en: The meat is really good. But there's so much. Don't leave any!
dialogue.lit: Meat really tasty. But too much. Don't-leave-please!
dialogue.r: Gogi jinjja masisseoyo. Geureonde neomu manayo. Namgiji maseyo!

dialogue.en: I'm full! Let's pack up the leftovers and take them home.
dialogue.r: Baebulleoyo! Nameun geon pojanghaeseo gajyeogayo.

dialogue.en: Good idea. Should we give Bbang some meat too?
dialogue.r: Joayo. Ppangido gogi jom julkkayo?

yourTurn.en: If Marco were here, he'd have liked it the most.
Cheers! Congratulations on your promotion!
I'm full! Let's pack up the leftovers.

lessons.titleEn: A friend moving to a new city

dialogue.t: —준호, 표정이 왜 그래요? 무슨 일 있어요?
dialogue.en: Junho, why that expression? Is something going on?
dialogue.lit: Junho, expression-subject why that-way? What thing is?
dialogue.r: Junho, pyojeongi wae geuraeyo? Museun il isseoyo?

dialogue.t: —회사에서 발령이 났어요. 부산으로 이사 가야 돼요.
dialogue.en: I got transferred at work. I have to move to Busan.
dialogue.lit: Company-at transfer-subject came-out. Busan-to move must-go.
dialogue.r: Hoesaeseo balryeongi nasseoyo. Busaneuro isa gaya dwaeyo.

dialogue.en: Busan? That's really far, you know...
dialogue.r: Busanyo? Jinjja meoljanayo...

dialogue.en: Right. So I already feel empty about it.
dialogue.r: Majayo. Geuraeseo beolsseo heojeonhaeyo.

dialogue.en: When are you going? Are you taking the train?
dialogue.r: Eonje gayo? Gichaero gayo?

dialogue.en: I'm going next week. Yes, by train.
dialogue.lit: Next week-at go. Yes, train-by go.

dialogue.r: Haha, ppangineun Busane eopseoyo! Geuraedo jal jeongchakhago isseoyo.

yourTurn.en: How's life in Busan? Better than I thought!
If I open the window, I can see the ocean.
Let's all meet up then!

dialogue.en: Minji's birthday party was really fun.
dialogue.r: Minji saengil pati jeongmal jaemiisseosseoyo.

dialogue.t: —맞아요! 마르코가 영상으로 와 줘서 더 좋았어요.

dialogue.lit: Correct! Marco-subject video-by came-give-so more good-was.
dialogue.r: Majayo! Markoga yeongsangeuro wa jwoseo deo joasseoyo.

dialogue.en: Minji was so moved she cried, remember.
dialogue.r: Minjiga gamdonghaeseo nunmul heullyeotjanayo.

dialogue.en: Speaking of which, how were your health checkup results?
dialogue.lit: Doing-so seeing, health checkup result-as-for how-was?
dialogue.r: Geureogo boni, geongang geomjin gyeolgwaneun eottaesseoyo?

dialogue.t: —다 정상이었어요! 그래도 운동은 더 해야 돼요.
dialogue.en: Everything was normal! But I still need to exercise more.
dialogue.lit: All normal-was! Still exercise-as-for more must-do.
dialogue.r: Da jeongsangieosseoyo! Geuraedo undongeun deo haeya dwaeyo.

dialogue.t: —그럼 준호 씨처럼 우리도 새로운 걸 시작해 봐요.
dialogue.en: Then like Junho, let's try starting something new too.
dialogue.lit: Then Junho Mr/Ms-like we-also new thing try-start.
dialogue.r: Geureom Junho ssicheoreom urido saeroun geol sijakhae bwayo.

dialogue.t: —맞아요. 준호 씨는 부산에서 정말 잘 지내고 있어요.
dialogue.en: Right. Junho's doing really well in Busan.
dialogue.lit: Correct. Junho Mr/Ms-as-for Busan-at really well spending is.
dialogue.r: Majayo. Junho ssineun Busaneseo jeongmal jal jinaego isseoyo.

dialogue.t: —창문 열면 바다 보인다고 했죠? 정말 부러워요.
dialogue.en: He said he can see the ocean from his window, right? I'm really jealous.
dialogue.lit: Window if-open ocean visible-said-right? Really envious.
dialogue.r: Changmun yeolmyeon bada boindago haetjyo? Jeongmal bureowoyo.

dialogue.t: —다음 달에 출장 오면 다 같이 만나기로 했어요.
dialogue.en: We decided to all meet up when he comes for his business trip next month.
dialogue.lit: Next month-at business-trip if-comes all together to-meet decided.
dialogue.r: Daeum dare chuljang omyeon da gachi mannagiro haesseoyo.

dialogue.en: I'm looking forward to it! There's been so much good stuff lately.
dialogue.lit: Looked-forward-to! These-days-as-for really good thing-subject many.
dialogue.r: Gidaedwaeyo! Yojeumeun jeongmal joeun iri manneyo.

yourTurn.t: 마르코가 영상으로 와 줘서 더 좋았어요.
yourTurn.en: It was even better because Marco joined by video.

yourTurn.t: 다음 달에 다 같이 만나기로 했어요.
yourTurn.en: We decided to all meet up next month.
There's been so much good stuff lately.

dialogue.en: Junho! It's been so long!
dialogue.r: Junho ssi! Oraenmanieyo!

dialogue.t: —마중 나와 줘서 고마워요! 다들 하나도 안 변했어요.
dialogue.en: Thanks for coming to meet me! You all haven't changed a bit.
dialogue.lit: Greeting came-give-so thanks! All-of-you one-even not changed.
dialogue.r: Majung nawa jwoseo gomawoyo! Dadeul hanado an byeonhaesseoyo.

dialogue.t: —기차역에서부터 보고 싶었어요! 근황 다 얘기해 줘요.
dialogue.en: I missed you ever since the train station! Tell me all your news.
dialogue.r: Gichayeogeseobuteo bogo sipeosseoyo! Geunhwang da yaegihae jwoyo.

dialogue.en: I will! But let's eat first. I'm hungry.
dialogue.lit: Will-do-so! But first rice-from eat. Hungry.
dialogue.r: Geureolgeyo! Geureonde meonjeo bapbuteo meogeoyo. Baegopayo.

dialogue.en: As expected, even going to Busan didn't change how hungry you get!
dialogue.lit: As-expected Busan even-go hungry thing exactly-same!
dialogue.r: Yeoksi Busan gado baegopeun geon ttokgatneyo!

dialogue.t: —(식사 후) 우리 세 시간이나 수다 떨었어요!
dialogue.en: (After eating) We chatted for three whole hours!
dialogue.r: (Siksa hu) Uri se sigani-na suda tteoreosseoyo!

dialogue.en: Really? I didn't notice the time passing.
dialogue.r: Jinjjayo? Sigan ganeun jul mollasseoyo.

dialogue.en: Me too. I feel recharged whenever I meet friends.
dialogue.r: Jeodoyo. Chingudeul mannanikka jaechungjeondoeneun geot gatayo.

dialogue.t: —내일도 시간 있어요? 출장 끝나고 또 봐요!
dialogue.en: Do you have time tomorrow too? Let's meet again after your business trip ends!
dialogue.lit: Tomorrow-also time is? Business-trip ending-and again see!
dialogue.r: Naeildo sigan isseoyo? Chuljang kkeunnago tto bwayo!

dialogue.t: —그럼요! 부산 가기 전에 한 번 더 만나요.
dialogue.en: Of course! Let's meet one more time before I go back to Busan.
dialogue.lit: Of-course! Busan go-before-at one time more meet.
dialogue.r: Geureomyo! Busan gagi jeone han beon deo mannayo.

yourTurn.en: It's been so long! You haven't changed a bit.
I didn't notice the time passing.
I feel recharged whenever I meet friends.

dialogue.en: Soyeon, want me to tell you a secret?
dialogue.r: Soyeon ssi, bimil hana malhae julkkayo?

dialogue.en: Yes! But can you trust me?
dialogue.r: Ne! Geureonde jeo mideul su isseoyo?

dialogue.t: —음... 입이 가벼우면 안 돼요. 절대 말하지 마세요.
dialogue.en: Hmm... You can't have a loose mouth. Absolutely don't tell anyone.
dialogue.lit: Um... Mouth-subject if-light not-okay. Absolutely don't-speak-please.
dialogue.r: Eum... Ibi gabyeoumyeon an dwaeyo. Jeoldae malhaji maseyo.

dialogue.en: Don't worry! My mouth is heavy (I can keep a secret).
dialogue.r: Geokjeong mayo! Jeo ip mugeowoyo.

dialogue.t: —사실... 준호 씨가 저한테 마음이 있는 것 같아요.
dialogue.en: Actually... I think Junho has feelings for me.
dialogue.lit: Actually... Junho Mr/Ms-subject me-to heart-subject having seems.
dialogue.r: Sasil... Junho ssiga jeohante maeumi inneun geot gatayo.

dialogue.t: —진짜요?! 소문이 나면 안 돼요. 아무한테도 말 안 할게요.
dialogue.en: Really?! It can't get out as a rumor. I won't tell anyone at all.
dialogue.lit: Really?! Rumor-subject if-comes-out not-okay. Anyone-to-even word not will-do.
dialogue.r: Jinjjayo?! Somuni namyeon an dwaeyo. Amuhantedo mal an halgeyo.

dialogue.en: Thanks! But I'm a bit nervous.
dialogue.r: Gomawoyo! Geureonde jom ginjangdwaeyo.

dialogue.en: Did Minji perhaps notice?
dialogue.r: Hoksi Minjiga nunchichaesseoyo?

dialogue.en: I don't know. What should I do if it gets found out?
dialogue.r: Moreugesseoyo. Deulkimyeon eotteokhajyo?

dialogue.en: It's fine. You'll come to know it slowly.
dialogue.r: Gwaenchanayo. Cheoncheonhi alge doel geoyeyo.

yourTurn.t: 저 믿을 수 있어요? 절대 말하지 마세요.
yourTurn.en: Can you trust me? Don't tell anyone.

yourTurn.t: 준호 씨가 저한테 마음이 있는 것 같아요.
yourTurn.en: I think Junho has feelings for me.
I won't tell anyone at all.

dialogue.en: Hello? Marco, why does your voice sound like that?
dialogue.r: Yeoboseyo? Marco, moksoriga wae geuraeyo?

dialogue.en: I had a job interview today. I was so nervous.
dialogue.r: Oneul myeonjeop bwasseoyo. Neomu ginjangdwaesseoyo.

dialogue.en: What company? Did you write a good resume?
dialogue.r: Museun hoesayeyo? Iryeokseoneun jal sseosseoyo?

dialogue.t: —한국 회사 한국 지사예요! 사실 꿈꾸던 자리예요.
dialogue.en: It's the Korean branch of a Korean company! Actually it's the position I've been dreaming of.
dialogue.lit: Korea company Korea branch-is! Actually dreaming-was position-is.
dialogue.r: Hanguk hoesa Hanguk jisayeyo! Sasil kkumkkudeon jariyeyo.

dialogue.t: —한국 지사요?! 그럼 다시 한국에 올 수 있어요?
dialogue.en: The Korean branch?! Then can you come back to Korea?
dialogue.lit: Korea branch-is? Then again Korea-to come can?
dialogue.r: Hanguk jisayo?! Geureom dasi Hanguge ol su isseoyo?

dialogue.en: Right! If I pass, I'll be able to go back!
dialogue.r: Majayo! Hapgyeokhamyeon dasi gal su isseoyo!

dialogue.t: —와! 이건 정말 좋은 기회예요. 잘될 거예요!
dialogue.en: Wow! This is a really great opportunity. It'll go well!
dialogue.lit: Wow! This really good opportunity-is. Will-go-well!
dialogue.r: Wa! Igeon jeongmal joeun gihoeyeyo. Jaldoel geoyeyo!

dialogue.t: —고마워요. 그 말 들으니까 긴장이 좀 풀려요.
dialogue.en: Thanks. Hearing that, I feel a bit less nervous.
dialogue.lit: Thanks. That word hear-because nervousness-subject a-bit loosens.
dialogue.r: Gomawoyo. Geu mal deureunikka ginjangi jom pullyeoyo.

dialogue.en: When do the results come out?
dialogue.r: Gyeolgwa eonje nawayo?

dialogue.t: —다음 주에요. 합격하면 제일 먼저 다 같이 알려줄게요!
dialogue.en: Next week. If I pass, I'll tell you all first thing!
dialogue.lit: Next week-is. If-pass most first all together will-let-know!
dialogue.r: Daeum jueyo. Hapgyeokhamyeon jeil meonjeo da gachi allyeojulgeyo!

yourTurn.en: I had a job interview today. I was so nervous.

yourTurn.t: 합격하면 다시 한국에 올 수 있어요!
yourTurn.en: If I pass, I'll be able to come back to Korea!

yourTurn.t: 합격하면 제일 먼저 다 같이 알려줄게요!
yourTurn.en: If I pass, I'll tell you all first thing!

dialogue.t: —마르코한테 연락 왔어요? 오늘 결과 나오는 날이잖아요.
dialogue.en: Did Marco contact you? Today's the day the results come out, you know.
dialogue.lit: Marco-to contact came? Today result coming-out day-you-know.
dialogue.r: Markohante yeollak wasseoyo? Oneul gyeolgwa naoneun nariljanayo.

dialogue.en: No, not yet. I'm so anxious too.
dialogue.r: Aniyo, ajigyo. Jeodo neomu chojohaeyo.

dialogue.en: I keep checking my mailbox. There's no news...
dialogue.lit: Mailbox continuously checking am. News-subject not-have...
dialogue.r: Meilham gyesok hwaginhago isseoyo. Soshigi eopseoyo...

dialogue.en: I'm so nervous I'm biting my nails.
dialogue.lit: I-as-for too nervous-because nail-object biting am.
dialogue.r: Jeoneun neomu ginjangdwaeseo sontobeul mureottutgo isseoyo.

dialogue.t: —하하, 그러지 마요! 좋은 결과 있을 거예요.
dialogue.en: Haha, don't do that! There will be a good result.
dialogue.r: Haha, geureoji mayo! Joeun gyeolgwa isseul geoyeyo.

dialogue.en: Let's pray together. Hoping Marco passes!
dialogue.r: Uri gachi gidohaeyo. Markoga hapgyeokhagil!

dialogue.en: (The phone rings) Oh! It's Marco!
dialogue.r: (Jeonhwabeori ullyeoyo) Eo! Markoyeyo!

dialogue.en: Answer it quickly! Good luck!
dialogue.r: Ppalli badayo! Haengureul bireoyo!

dialogue.en: Hello? Marco, how did it go?
dialogue.r: Yeoboseyo? Marco, eotteoke dwaesseoyo?

dialogue.t: —참을성을 가져요... 곧 다 같이 알게 될 거예요!
dialogue.en: Have some patience... You'll all find out together soon!
dialogue.lit: Patience-object have... Soon all together to-know will-become!
dialogue.r: Chameulseongeul gajyeoyo... Got da gachi alge doel geoyeyo!

yourTurn.t: 메일함 계속 확인하고 있어요. 소식이 없어요.
yourTurn.en: I keep checking my mailbox. There's no news.
Let's pray together. Hoping Marco passes!
Answer it quickly! Good luck!

dialogue.en: Minji, Bbang seemed a bit lonely lately.
dialogue.lit: Minji, Bbang-subject these-days a-bit lonely looked.
dialogue.r: Minji, ppangiga yojeum jom oeroweo boyeosseoyo.

dialogue.en: So I adopted one more puppy!
dialogue.r: Geuraeseo gangaji han mari deo bunyangbadasseoyo!

dialogue.en: Really?! Show me, quickly!
dialogue.r: Jinjjayo?! Boyeo jwoyo, ppalli!

dialogue.en: Its name is 'Milk.' I think it'll get along well with Bbang.
dialogue.r: Ireumeun 'uyu'yeyo. Ppangirang jal majeul geot gatayo.

dialogue.en: Bread and Milk, what an adorable combination!
dialogue.r: Ppangirang uyurani, neomu gwiyeoun johabieyo!

dialogue.en: Their personalities are similar too. Both are lively.
dialogue.r: Seonggyeokdo biseuthaeyo. Dul da hwalbalhaeyo.

dialogue.en: Look, they're already wagging tails and welcoming each other!
dialogue.r: Bwayo, beolsseo kkori heundeulmyeo bangineyo!

dialogue.t: —금방 친해질 것 같아요. 산책 친구도 생겼네요.
dialogue.en: I think they'll become close soon. He's got a walking buddy now too.
dialogue.lit: Soon become-close seems. Walk friend-also appeared.
dialogue.r: Geumbang chinhaejil geot gatayo. Sanchaek chingudo saengyeonneyo.

dialogue.en: Now Bbang won't be lonely anymore either.
dialogue.r: Ije ppangido an oeroul geoyeyo.

yourTurn.t: 빵이가 외로워 보여서 강아지를 한 마리 더 분양받았어요.
yourTurn.en: Bbang seemed a bit lonely lately, so I adopted one more puppy.
What an adorable combination, Bread and Milk!
Now Bbang won't be lonely anymore either.

dialogue.en: You said to have patience, what is it?! Tell us quickly!
dialogue.r: Chameulseongeul gajiradeoni, mwondeyo?! Ppalli malhaeyo!

dialogue.en: I... I passed!!!
dialogue.r: Jeo... hapgyeokhaesseoyo!!!

dialogue.en: Aaahh!! (Everyone screams together)
dialogue.r: Kkayaak!! (Da gachi bimyeongeul jilleoyo)

dialogue.en: I can't believe it! Are you really coming back to Korea?
dialogue.r: Mitgiji anayo! Jinjja Hanguge dasi wayo?

dialogue.en: Yes! I start at the Korean branch next month!
dialogue.lit: Yes! Next month-at Korea branch-to commute!
dialogue.r: Ne! Daeum dare Hanguk jisaro chulgeunhaeyo!

dialogue.en: It feels just like a dream! Did you already book your plane ticket?
dialogue.r: Kkumman gatayo! Bihaenggipyoneun beolsseo kkeuneosseoyo?

dialogue.t: —네, 오늘 바로 끊었어요. 이제 진짜 재입사예요!
dialogue.en: Yes, I booked it right away today. Now it's really a re-joining!
dialogue.lit: Yes, today right-away cut. Now really re-entering-is!
dialogue.r: Ne, oneul baro kkeuneosseoyo. Ije jinjja jaeipsayeyo!

dialogue.t: —다시 한 팀이 되는 거네요! 정말 환영해요, 마르코!
dialogue.en: We're becoming one team again! Welcome back so much, Marco!
dialogue.lit: Again one team-subject becoming thing-is! Really welcome, Marco!
dialogue.r: Dasi han timi doeneun geoneyo! Jeongmal hwanyeonghaeyo, Marco!

dialogue.t: —이게 다 기적 같아요. 다들 정말 고마워요.
dialogue.en: This all feels like a miracle. Thank you all so much.
dialogue.lit: This all miracle seems. Everyone really thanks.
dialogue.r: Ige da gijeok gatayo. Dadeul jeongmal gomawoyo.

dialogue.en: Bbang's going to be so happy when he meets Marco!
dialogue.r: Ppangiga Marco mannamyeon jeongmal joahal geoyeyo!

yourTurn.en: I passed!!! I can't believe it!
It feels just like a dream!

yourTurn.t: 다시 한 팀이 되는 거네요! 환영해요!
yourTurn.en: We're becoming one team again! Welcome back!

dialogue.en: Marco, did you find a room?
dialogue.r: Marco, bangeun guhaesseoyo?

dialogue.en: Not yet. Will you come with me to the real estate office now?
dialogue.r: Ajigyo. Jigeum budongsan gachi ga jullaeyo?

dialogue.en: Of course! What kind of place are you looking for?
dialogue.r: Geureomyo! Eotteon jibeul chajayo?

dialogue.en: I'd love it if the monthly rent is cheap and it's not far from the office.
dialogue.lit: Monthly-rent cheap-and, company-from not far-if would-be-good.
dialogue.r: Wolse ssago, hoesaeseo an meoreosseumyeon jokesseoyo.

dialogue.en: Look here! The deposit is reasonable and there's even a rooftop.
dialogue.lit: Here look-please! Deposit-also reasonable-and rooftop-also is.
dialogue.r: Yeogi boseyo! Bojeungeumdo jeokdanghago oksangdo isseoyo.

dialogue.t: —와, 전망이 정말 좋아요! 옥상에서 빵 먹기 딱 좋겠어요.
dialogue.en: Wow, the view is really nice! It'd be perfect for eating bread on the rooftop.
dialogue.lit: Wow, view-subject really good! Rooftop-at bread eating exactly would-be-good.
dialogue.r: Wa, jeonmangi jeongmal joayo! Oksangeseo ppang meokgi ttak jokesseoyo.

dialogue.en: Of course you think of bread first! How are the neighbors?
dialogue.lit: As-expected bread thought-from do! Neighbors-as-for how?
dialogue.r: Yeoksi ppang saenggakbuteo haneyo! Iutdeureun eottaeyo?

dialogue.t: —다 친절하대요. 그리고 회사에서 십 분 거리예요.
dialogue.en: They say everyone's kind. And it's a ten-minute distance from the office.
dialogue.lit: All kind-they-say. And company-from ten minute distance-is.
dialogue.r: Da chinjeolhadaeyo. Geurigo hoesaeseo sip bun georiyeyo.

dialogue.en: I love it completely! I'll sign the contract.
dialogue.r: Maeume ssok deureoyo! Gyeyakseoe seomyeonghalgeyo.

dialogue.en: Congratulations! Now you're really a Korea person again.
dialogue.lit: Congratulate! Now really again Korea person-is.
dialogue.r: Chukhahaeyo! Ije jinjja dasi Hanguk saramineyo.

yourTurn.en: Will you come with me to the real estate office?
I'd love it if it's not far from the office.
I love it completely! I'll sign the contract.

lessons.titleEn: Going to the airport to welcome him

dialogue.en: What time does Marco arrive?
dialogue.r: Marco dochak sigani myeot siyeyo?

dialogue.en: It's 3pm. Did you check which terminal?
dialogue.lit: Afternoon three o'clock-is. Which terminal-whether checked?
dialogue.r: Ohu se siyeyo. Eoneu teominoreonji hwaginhaesseoyo?

dialogue.en: Yes, terminal 1. I made a sign. 'WELCOME Marco!'
dialogue.r: Ne, il teominoreyo. Pyojipan mandeureosseoyo. 'WELCOME Marco!'

dialogue.en: I brought a bouquet of flowers!
dialogue.r: Jeoneun kkotdabal gajyeowasseoyo!

dialogue.en: There he is! He's getting his luggage and coming out!
dialogue.r: Jeogiyeyo! Jim chatgo naogo isseoyo!

dialogue.en: Marco!! Over here!!
dialogue.r: Marco!! Yeogiyeyo!!

dialogue.en: Everyone!! (Runs over and hugs them tightly)
dialogue.r: Dadeul!! (Dallyeogaseo kkwak anayo)

dialogue.en: We finally met! I missed you so much!
dialogue.r: Deudieo mannasseoyo! Jeongmal bogo sipeosseoyo!

dialogue.en: What's this sign? It's so cute, haha!
dialogue.lit: This sign what-is? Too cute, haha!
dialogue.r: I pyojipan mwoyeyo? Neomu gwiyeowoyo, haha!

dialogue.t: —집에 가는 길에 빵집부터 가요. 한국 빵 그리웠죠?
dialogue.en: Let's stop at a bakery on the way home first. You missed Korean bread, right?
dialogue.lit: Home going way-at bakery-from go. Korea bread missed-right?
dialogue.r: Jibe ganeun gire ppangjipbuteo gayo. Hanguk ppang geuriwotjyo?

yourTurn.en: What time does Marco arrive?
We finally met! I missed you so much!
Let's stop at a bakery on the way home first.

dialogue.en: Tonight's dinner is Marco's welcome-back party!
dialogue.r: Oneul jeonyeogeun Marco hwanyeong patiyeyo!

dialogue.en: We prepared Korean food. It's all the flavors you missed, right?
dialogue.r: Hansigeuro junbihaesseoyo. Da geuriwotdeon masijyo?

dialogue.t: —네! 한 입 먹으니까 고향에 온 기분이에요.
dialogue.en: Yes! After one bite, it feels like I've come home.
dialogue.lit: Yes! One bite eat-because hometown-to came feeling-is.
dialogue.r: Ne! Han ip meogeunikka gohyange on gibunieyo.

dialogue.en: This place is exactly the same as before. Nothing has changed.
dialogue.lit: Here-as-for before exactly-as-is. Anything-even not changed.
dialogue.r: Yeogineun yejeon geudaeroyeyo. Amugeotdo an byeonhaesseoyo.

dialogue.t: —건배사 하나 할게요! 우리 모두를 위해서, 그리고 새로운 시작을 위해서!
dialogue.en: I'll give a toast! For all of us, and for a new beginning!
dialogue.lit: Toast-speech one will-do! We all-object for, and new beginning-object for!
dialogue.r: Geonbaesa hana halgeyo! Uri modureul wihaeseo, geurigo saeroun sijageul wihaeseo!

dialogue.t: —건배!! 마르코 다시 온 거 진짜 행복해요.
dialogue.en: Cheers!! I'm really happy Marco came back.
dialogue.lit: Cheers!! Marco again came thing really happy.
dialogue.r: Geonbae!! Marco dasi on geo jinjja haengbokhaeyo.

dialogue.t: —다들 감사 인사 하고 싶어요. 제가 없는 동안 너무 고마웠어요.
dialogue.en: I want to thank everyone. While I was away, you were all so wonderful to me.
dialogue.lit: Everyone thanks-greeting do want. I not-having while too thankful-was.

dialogue.r: Geurigo hwanyeong patido haesseoyo. Hansik jeongmal masisseosseoyo.

dialogue.r: Ije jinjja da gachi inneyo. Neomu joayo.

yourTurn.t: 헤어져도 우리는 항상 연결돼 있을 거예요.

dialogue.r: Wa! Jinjja biseuthaeyo! Saturi sejyeotneundeyo?

dialogue.en: Junho teaches me every time we video call.

dialogue.r: Jeodo baeugo sipeoyo! Daeume gachi gareuchyeo jwoyo.

dialogue.t: —그래요! 그럼 준호 부르고 다 같이 연습해요.

dialogue.lit: So-do! Then Junho call-and all together practice.
dialogue.r: Geuraeyo! Geureom Junho bureugo da gachi yeonseuphaeyo.

yourTurn.t: 저도 배우고 싶어요! 다음에 가르쳐 줘요.

dialogue.en: Minji, have you felt a bit hurt by Soyeon lately?

dialogue.lit: Honestly, yes... These-days contact-subject too not-had.
dialogue.r: Soljikhi, ne... Yojeum yeollagi neomu eopseosseoyo.

dialogue.lit: Misunderstanding-subject a-bit piled seems. Conversation-by must-resolve.
dialogue.r: Ohaega jom ssain geot gatayo. Daehwaro pureoya dwaeyo.

dialogue.r: Geureonde Soyeon ssi ipjangdo deureobwajyo.

dialogue.lit: (Soyeon-to) Soyeon Mr/Ms, these-days a-bit became-distant seems-so upset-was.
dialogue.r: (Soyeone-ge) Soyeon ssi, yojeum jom meoreojin geot gataseo sokssanghaesseoyo.

dialogue.lit: Sorry... These-days work-subject too busy-so contact-object couldn't-do.
dialogue.r: Mianhaeyo... Yojeum iri neomu bappaseo yeollageul mot haesseoyo.

dialogue.r: Geuraetgunyo. Jinsimeuro geuge iyuyeosseoyo?

dialogue.t: —네, 정말이에요. 서로 다른 일정 때문에 오해가 생겼나 봐요.
dialogue.en: Yes, it's true. I think the misunderstanding happened because of our different schedules.
dialogue.lit: Yes, true-is. Each-other different schedule because-of misunderstanding-subject happened-seems.
dialogue.r: Ne, jeongmarieyo. Seoro dareun iljeong ttaemune ohaega saenggyeotnaboayo.

dialogue.en: I understand. I guess I got upset too quickly too.
dialogue.r: Ihaehaeyo. Jeodo neomu ppalli sokssanghaehaennaboayo.

dialogue.t: —고마워요, 이해해 줘서. 우리 관계 다시 회복된 것 같아요.

dialogue.lit: Thanks, understand-give-so. We relationship again recovered seems.

yourTurn.en: I think misunderstanding has built up a bit.

yourTurn.t: 일이 너무 바빠서 연락을 못 했어요.

yourTurn.t: 우리 관계 다시 회복된 것 같아요.

dialogue.t: —소연 씨, 요즘 표정이 좀 무거워 보여요.

dialogue.lit: Soyeon Mr/Ms, these-days expression-subject a-bit heavy looks.

dialogue.lit: Team-leader-subject becoming-since responsibility-feeling because-of a-bit hard.

dialogue.en: I understand. I really relate to that feeling.

dialogue.t: —혼자 다 짊어지려고 하지 마요. 우리가 있잖아요.

dialogue.lit: Alone all to-carry don't-try. We-subject have-you-know.

dialogue.r: Gomawoyo. Honjaga anirananeun geol neukkinikka jom wiroga dwaeyo.

dialogue.en: If you ever need advice, tell me anytime. Let's endure it together.

dialogue.r: Joeoni piryohamyeon eonjedeun malhaeyo. Gachi gyeondyeoyo.

yourTurn.t: 요즘 고민이 좀 있어요. 털어놓아도 돼요?

Sharing my heart made me feel much lighter.

dialogue.t: —오늘 빵이 생일이에요! 벌써 한 살이 됐어요.

Just watching makes my mood lift.

yourTurn.t: 매일 자라는 거 지켜보는 게 정말 행복해요.
yourTurn.en: Watching them grow up every day makes me really happy.
