dialogue.r: Jiltuhaneun geoyeyo? Haha, dul saien byeoril eopseoyo!

dialogue.t: —그냥 둘이 일 얘기 하는 거예요. 빵집 사업 같이 알아보고 있대요.
dialogue.en: They're just talking about work. I heard they're looking into a bakery business together.
dialogue.lit: Just two-people work talk doing thing-is. Bakery business together looking-into-they-say.
dialogue.r: Geunyang duri il yaegi haneun geoyeyo. Ppangjip saeop gachi arabogo itdaeyo.

dialogue.en: A bakery business?! What does that mean?
dialogue.r: Ppangjip saeopyo?! Geuge museun marieyo?

dialogue.t: —마르코가 작은 빵집을 열고 싶어 해요. 그게 다예요!
dialogue.en: Marco wants to open a small bakery. That's all it is!
dialogue.lit: Marco-subject small bakery-object open-want-does. That all-is!
dialogue.r: Markoga jageun ppangjibeul yeolgo sipeo haeyo. Geuge dayeyo!

dialogue.en: Oh... I was worried over nothing. I'm sorry.
dialogue.lit: Oh... I needless worry-object did. Sorry.
dialogue.r: A... Jega gwaenhan geokjeongeul haenneyo. Joesonghaeyo.

dialogue.t: —신경 쓰지 마요. 솔직하게 말해 줘서 고마워요.
dialogue.en: Don't worry about it. Thanks for telling me honestly.
dialogue.r: Singyeong sseuji mayo. Soljikhage malhae jwoseo gomawoyo.

dialogue.t: —이제 마음이 놓여요. 빵집 얘기 더 듣고 싶어요!
dialogue.en: Now I feel relieved. I want to hear more about the bakery!
dialogue.lit: Now heart-subject relieved. Bakery talk more hear-want!
dialogue.r: Ije maeumi noyeoyo. Ppangjip yaegi deo deutgo sipeoyo!

dialogue.t: —저도요! 마르코가 빵집 차리면 우리가 첫 손님이에요.
dialogue.en: Me too! If Marco opens the bakery, we'll be his first customers.
dialogue.lit: Me-too! Marco-subject bakery if-sets-up we-subject first customer-is.
dialogue.r: Jeodoyo! Markoga ppangjip charimyeon uriga cheot soninimieyo.

yourTurn.t: 질투하는 거예요? 둘 사이엔 별일 없어요!
yourTurn.en: Are you jealous? There's nothing going on between them!
I was worried over nothing. I'm sorry.

yourTurn.t: 마르코가 빵집 차리면 우리가 첫 손님이에요.
yourTurn.en: If Marco opens the bakery, we'll be his first customers.

dialogue.t: —마르코, 빵집 사업 계획 좀 들어 봐도 돼요?
dialogue.en: Marco, can I hear about your bakery business plan?
dialogue.lit: Marco, bakery business plan a-bit hear-try-may?
dialogue.r: Marco, ppangjip saeop gyehoek jom deureo bwado dwaeyo?

dialogue.t: —그럼요! 소연 씨랑 같이 동업자가 되기로 했어요.
dialogue.en: Of course! Soyeon and I decided to become business partners together.
dialogue.lit: Of-course! Soyeon Mr/Ms-with together business-partner-subject to-become decided.
dialogue.r: Geureomyo! Soyeon ssirang gachi dongeopjaga doegiro haesseoyo.

dialogue.en: Wow! Did you decide on the shop location?
dialogue.r: Wa! Gage jarineun jeonghaesseoyo?

dialogue.en: Almost. And I'm developing new menu items too.
dialogue.lit: Almost-is. And new menu-also developing am.
dialogue.r: Geoiyo. Geurigo sae menyudo gaebalhago isseoyo.

dialogue.t: —간판 이름은 뭐예요? 분명 빵 관련일 것 같아요.
dialogue.en: What's the shop sign name? I bet it's bread-related.
dialogue.lit: Sign name-as-for what-is? Surely bread related-probably seems.
dialogue.r: Ganpan ireumeun mwoyeyo? Bunmyeong ppang gwallyeonil geot gatayo.

dialogue.en: Right! It's 'Marco's Bakery.' Is it too simple?
dialogue.r: Majayo! 'Markoui ppangjip'ieyo. Neomu dansunhangayo?

dialogue.t: —아니요, 딱 좋아요! 저도 조금 투자하고 싶어요.
dialogue.en: No, it's just right! I want to invest a little too.
dialogue.lit: No, exactly good! I-also a-little invest-want.
dialogue.r: Aniyo, ttak joayo! Jeodo jogeum tujahago sipeoyo.

dialogue.t: —정말요? 너무 고마워요! 다들 꿈을 이루게 도와주네요.
dialogue.en: Really? Thank you so much! Everyone's helping me achieve my dream.
dialogue.lit: Really-is? Too thanks! Everyone dream-object achieve-to-do help-give.
dialogue.r: Jeongmallyo? Neomu gomawoyo! Dadeul kkumeul iruge dowajuneyo.

dialogue.en: Let's all pool together some support funds!
dialogue.r: Uri da gachi eungwongeum moayo!

dialogue.en: Thank you, everyone. When it opens, I'll invite you all first!
dialogue.lit: Thanks, everyone. Opening-if most first will-invite!
dialogue.r: Gomawoyo, yeoreobun. Gaeeophamyeon jeil meonjeo chodaehalgeyo!

yourTurn.t: 소연 씨랑 같이 동업자가 되기로 했어요.
yourTurn.en: Soyeon and I decided to become business partners.
It's 'Marco's Bakery.' Is it too simple?
When it opens, I'll invite you all first!

dialogue.t: —민지, 그때 마르코랑 소연 씨 일로 괜히 걱정했잖아요.
dialogue.en: Minji, you worried for nothing about Marco and Soyeon back then, remember.
dialogue.lit: Minji, that-time Marco-and Soyeon Mr/Ms thing-by needlessly worried-you-know.
dialogue.r: Minji, geuttae Markorang Soyeon ssi illo gwaenhi geokjeonghaetjanayo.

dialogue.en: Right, haha. It was actually a bakery business conversation.
dialogue.lit: Correct, haha. Actually-as-for bakery business talk-was.
dialogue.r: Majayo, haha. Sasireun ppangjip saeop yaegieosseoyo.

dialogue.en: They even decided on the name 'Marco's Bakery,' remember.
dialogue.r: 'Markoui ppangjip'iraneun ireumdo jeonghaetjanayo.

dialogue.en: Marco is really making an effort to achieve his dream.
dialogue.lit: Marco-subject really dream-object trying-to-achieve effort-doing am.
dialogue.r: Markoga jeongmal kkumeul iruryeogo noryeokhago isseoyo.

dialogue.en: We also pooled support money, remember. Everyone's investing too.
dialogue.lit: We-also support-money gathered-you-know. All-of-you investment-also do-and.
dialogue.r: Urido eungwongeum moatjanayo. Dadeul tujado hagoyo.

dialogue.en: I hope this bakery does well.
dialogue.r: I ppangjibi jaldwaesseumyeon jokesseoyo.

dialogue.t: —분명 잘될 거예요. 마르코는 정말 빵을 사랑하잖아요.
dialogue.en: It'll surely go well. Marco really loves bread, you know.
dialogue.lit: Surely will-go-well. Marco-as-for really bread-object loves-you-know.
dialogue.r: Bunmyeong jaldoel geoyeyo. Markoneun jeongmal ppangeul saranghajanayo.

dialogue.en: When it opens, let's go first and celebrate it.
dialogue.r: Gaeeophamyeon jeil meonjeo gaseo chukhahae jwoyo.

dialogue.en: Sure! I think the bakery story is going to continue.
dialogue.r: Geuraeyo! Ppangjip iyagineun gyesokdoel geot gatayo.

dialogue.t: —맞아요. 우리 이야기 속에 또 다른 이야기가 시작되네요.
dialogue.en: Right. Another story is starting within our story.
dialogue.lit: Correct. We story inside-at again different story-subject starting.
dialogue.r: Majayo. Uri iyagi soge tto dareun iyagiga sijakdoeneyo.

yourTurn.t: 마르코가 정말 꿈을 이루려고 노력하고 있어요.
yourTurn.en: Marco is really making an effort to achieve his dream.
I hope this bakery does well.

yourTurn.t: 우리 이야기 속에 또 다른 이야기가 시작되네요.
yourTurn.en: Another story is starting within our story.

dialogue.en: Finally tomorrow is the opening ceremony! Is everything ready?
dialogue.r: Deudieo naeiri gaeeopsigieyo! Da junbidwaesseoyo?

dialogue.en: Almost! I'm kneading the dough one last time right now.
dialogue.r: Geoiyo! Jigeum majimageuro banjukhago isseoyo.

dialogue.en: I'll help you bake it in the oven!
dialogue.r: Jega obeune gumneun geo dowajulgeyo!

dialogue.en: Thanks! I made the whole menu board too.
dialogue.r: Gomawoyo! Menyupando da mandeureosseoyo.

dialogue.en: Wow, it really looks great! I heard you're also doing a tasting event today?
dialogue.lit: Wow, really cool! Today tasting-also doing-they-say?
dialogue.r: Wa, jinjja meosisseoyo! Oneul siksikoedo handamyeonseoyo?

dialogue.en: Yes! I invited people from the neighborhood. I'm so nervous.
dialogue.lit: Yes! Neighborhood people invited. Too nervous.
dialogue.r: Ne! Dongne saramdeul chodaehaesseoyo. Neomu ginjangdwaeyo.

dialogue.en: You look nervous, but you also look really happy.
dialogue.r: Ginjanghan pyojeongijiman neomu haengbokhae boyeoyo.

dialogue.t: —맞아요. 정말 다 같이 힘을 모아서 여기까지 왔어요.
dialogue.en: Right. We really gathered our strength together to get this far.
dialogue.lit: Correct. Really all together strength-object gathering-so here-until came.
dialogue.r: Majayo. Jeongmal da gachi himeul moaseo yeogikkaji wasseoyo.

dialogue.t: —첫 손님은 누구예요? 저희가 첫 손님 할게요!
dialogue.en: Who's the first customer? Let us be the first customers!
dialogue.lit: First customer-as-for who-is? We-subject first customer will-do!
dialogue.r: Cheot soninimeun nuguyeyo? Jeohuiga cheot sonim halgeyo!

dialogue.t: —당연하죠! 여러분 없으면 이 빵집도 없었을 거예요.
dialogue.en: Of course! Without you all, this bakery wouldn't even exist.
dialogue.lit: Naturally-right! Everyone not-have-if this bakery-also wouldn't-have-existed-probably.
dialogue.r: Dangyeonhajyo! Yeoreobun eopseumyeon i ppangjipdo eopseosseul geoyeyo.

yourTurn.en: Finally tomorrow is the opening ceremony!

yourTurn.t: 정말 다 같이 힘을 모아서 여기까지 왔어요.
yourTurn.en: We really gathered our strength together to get this far.

yourTurn.t: 여러분 없으면 이 빵집도 없었을 거예요.
yourTurn.en: Without you all, this bakery wouldn't even exist.

dialogue.en: People are already lined up!
dialogue.r: Saramdeuri beolsseo jureul seo isseoyo!

dialogue.en: I can't believe it... It's really my bakery.
dialogue.r: Mitgiji anayo... Jinjja je ppangjibieyo.

dialogue.t: —자, 리본 자를 준비됐어요? 다 같이 세 보자!
dialogue.en: Okay, ready to cut the ribbon? Let's all count together!
dialogue.lit: Now, ribbon cut ready-became? All together let's-count!
dialogue.r: Ja, ribon jareul junbidwaesseoyo? Da gachi se boja!

dialogue.en: One, two, three! (Cuts the ribbon)
dialogue.r: Hana, dul, set! (Ribon-eul jallayo)

dialogue.en: Yaaay!! Congratulations, Marco!
dialogue.r: Waaa!! Chukhahaeyo, Marco!

dialogue.en: The dream became reality. It's all thanks to you.
dialogue.lit: Dream-subject reality-subject became. All everyone thanks-of-is.
dialogue.r: Kkumi hyeonsiri dwaesseoyo. Da yeoreobun deokbunieyo.

dialogue.t: —저희가 첫 손님이에요! 빵 다섯 개 주세요!
dialogue.en: We're the first customers! Five breads, please!
dialogue.lit: We-subject first customer-is! Bread five pieces give-please!
dialogue.r: Jeohuiga cheot soninimieyo! Ppang daseot gae juseyo!

dialogue.en: Thank you! This is the first sale. I'm truly overwhelmed with emotion.
dialogue.lit: Thanks! This first sales-amount-is. Really deeply-moved.
dialogue.r: Gomawoyo! Ige cheot maesangieyo. Jeongmal gamgyeokseureowoyo.

dialogue.t: —이제 단골 손님이 될게요! 매일 올 거예요.
dialogue.en: I'll become a regular customer from now on! I'll come every day.
dialogue.lit: Now regular customer-subject will-become! Every-day will-come.
dialogue.r: Ije dangol sonimi doelgeyo! Maeil ol geoyeyo.

dialogue.t: —모두의 노력 덕분에 여기까지 왔어요. 다 같이 건배해요!
dialogue.en: Thanks to everyone's effort, we made it this far. Let's all toast together!
dialogue.lit: Everyone-of effort thanks-of here-until came. All together toast!
dialogue.r: Moduui noryeok deokbune yeogikkaji wasseoyo. Da gachi geonbaehaeyo!

yourTurn.t: 꿈이 현실이 됐어요. 다 여러분 덕분이에요.
yourTurn.en: The dream became reality. It's all thanks to you.

yourTurn.t: 저희가 첫 손님이에요! 빵 다섯 개 주세요!
yourTurn.en: We're the first customers! Five breads, please!
Thanks to everyone's effort, we made it this far.

dialogue.en: Finally it's the wedding day! The wedding hall is really beautiful.
dialogue.lit: Finally wedding day-is! Wedding-hall-subject really pretty.
dialogue.r: Deudieo gyeolhonsik narieyo! Gyeolhonsikjangi jeongmal yeppeoyo.

dialogue.en: Soyeon looks so dazzlingly beautiful!
dialogue.r: Soyeon ssi neomu nunbusige areumdawoyo!

dialogue.t: —준호 씨도 정말 멋있어요. 신랑 신부 둘 다 빛나요.
dialogue.en: Junho looks really handsome too. Both the groom and bride are shining.
dialogue.lit: Junho Mr/Ms-also really cool. Groom bride two both shine.
dialogue.r: Junho ssido jeongmal meosisseoyo. Sillang sinbu dul da bitnayo.

dialogue.en: Marco's going to sing a congratulatory song! Let's listen.
dialogue.r: Markoga chukga bureundaeyo! Deureo bwayo.

dialogue.t: —(노래 후) 와, 정말 감동적이었어요! 다들 울었어요.
dialogue.en: (After the song) Wow, that was really moving! Everyone cried.
dialogue.lit: (Song after) Wow, really moving-was! All-of-you cried.
dialogue.r: (Norae hu) Wa, jeongmal gamdongjeogieosseoyo! Dadeul ureosseoyo.

dialogue.en: The officiant's words were really warm too. They wished 'may you be happy forever.'
dialogue.r: Juryesado jeongmal ttatteuthaesseoyo. 'Yeongwonhi haengbokhagil' bireo jusyeosseoyo.

dialogue.en: Now it's time for the bouquet toss! Who will catch it?
dialogue.lit: Now bouquet throwing time-is! Who will-catch?
dialogue.r: Ije bukue deonjineun siganieyo! Nuga badeulkkayo?

dialogue.en: (Minji catches it) Oh my, I caught it!
dialogue.r: (Minjiga badayo) Eomeo, jega badasseoyo!

dialogue.en: All the guests are clapping! It's truly a beautiful wedding.
dialogue.lit: Guests-subject all clap! Really beautiful wedding-is.
dialogue.r: Hagaekdeuri da baksuchyeoyo! Jeongmal areumdaun gyeolhonsigieyo.

yourTurn.en: Soyeon looks so dazzlingly beautiful!
That was really moving! Everyone cried.
It's truly a beautiful wedding.

dialogue.t: —벌써 몇 년이 흘렀네요. 시간 진짜 빠르죠?
dialogue.en: Several years have already flowed by. Time really flies, right?
dialogue.lit: Already several-years-subject flowed. Time really fast-right?
dialogue.r: Beolsseo myeot nyeoni heulleonneyo. Sigan jinjja ppareujyo?

dialogue.en: Right. But we're still close without ever changing.
dialogue.r: Majayo. Geureonde urineun byeonhameopsi gakkawoyo.

dialogue.t: —처음 만났을 때 생각나요? 첫 인사 나눴잖아요.
dialogue.en: Do you remember when we first met? We exchanged our first greetings, remember.
dialogue.lit: First met-time thought-comes? First greeting exchanged-you-know.
dialogue.r: Cheoeum mannasseul ttae saenggangnayo? Cheot insa nanwotjanayo.

dialogue.en: From that time until now, there's really been a lot.
dialogue.lit: That-time-from now-until really many thing-subject was.
dialogue.r: Geuttaebuteo jigeumkkaji jeongmal maneun iri isseosseoyo.

dialogue.en: Marco consistently loves bread, haha.
dialogue.r: Markoneun hangyeolgachi ppangeul saranghaeyo, haha.

dialogue.en: Right! That never changes at all.
dialogue.r: Majayo! Geugeon jeoldae an byeonhaeyo.

dialogue.t: —지나온 시간을 돌아보면, 다 좋은 사람들 덕분이었어요.
dialogue.en: Looking back on the time that's passed, it was all thanks to good people.
dialogue.lit: Passed-through time-object if-look-back, all good people thanks-of-was.
dialogue.r: Jinaon siganeul dorabomyeon, da joeun saramdeul deokbunieosseoyo.

dialogue.en: I felt really reassured because you all stayed by my side.
dialogue.r: Yeoreobuni gyeote isseo jwoseo jeongmal deundeunhaesseoyo.

dialogue.en: We're all people I'm deeply grateful for, from the bottom of my heart.
dialogue.lit: Heart deeply thankful people-are, we all.
dialogue.r: Maeum gipi gomaun saramdeurieyo, uri modu.

dialogue.en: Me too. Let's keep staying by each other's side like this from now on.
dialogue.lit: Me-too. Forward-also continuously this-way side-at be.
dialogue.r: Jeodoyo. Apeurodo gyesok ireoke gyeote isseoyo.

yourTurn.en: We're still close without ever changing.

yourTurn.t: 여러분이 곁에 있어 줘서 정말 든든했어요.
yourTurn.en: I felt really reassured because you all stayed by my side.
Let's keep staying by each other's side like this.

dialogue.en: I'm preparing a special gathering this weekend.
dialogue.lit: This weekend-at special gathering-object preparing am.
dialogue.r: Ibeon jumare teukbyeolhan moimeul junbihago isseoyo.

dialogue.t: —무슨 모임이에요? 다 같이 한자리에 모이는 거예요?
dialogue.en: What kind of gathering? Are we all getting together in one place?
dialogue.lit: What gathering-is? All together one-place-at gathering thing-is?
dialogue.r: Museun moimieyo? Da gachi hanjarie moineun geoyeyo?

dialogue.t: —네! 마르코, 준호, 소연 씨, 다 불렀어요.
dialogue.en: Yes! I called Marco, Junho, and Soyeon, all of them.
dialogue.lit: Yes! Marco, Junho, Soyeon Mr/Ms, all called.
dialogue.r: Ne! Marco, Junho, Soyeon ssi, da bulleosseoyo.

dialogue.en: Let's also open the photo album and look at old photos together.
dialogue.lit: Photo-album-also opening-and old photo together look.
dialogue.r: Sajincheopdo pyeolchyeoseo yetnal sajin gachi bwayo.

dialogue.t: —처음부터 끝까지, 함께한 모든 순간을 떠올리고 싶어요.
dialogue.en: From beginning to end, I want to recall every moment we shared.
dialogue.lit: Start-from end-until, together-did all moment-object recall-want.
dialogue.r: Cheoeumbuteo kkeutkkaji, hamkkehan modeun sunganeul tteoolligo sipeoyo.

dialogue.en: There must be so much to prepare!
dialogue.r: Junbihal ge jeongmal mangesseoyo!

dialogue.t: —맞아요. 그런데 이건 정말 의미 있는 자리니까요.
dialogue.en: Right. But it's because this is such a meaningful occasion.
dialogue.lit: Correct. But this really meaning having occasion-because-is.
dialogue.r: Majayo. Geureonde igeon jeongmal uimi inneun jariikkayo.

dialogue.en: I'll prepare with my whole heart.
dialogue.r: On maeumeul dahaeseo junbihalgeyo.

dialogue.en: I'll help too. Let's make it all together.
dialogue.lit: I-also will-help. We all together let's-make.
dialogue.r: Jeodo dowajulgeyo. Uri da gachi mandeureoyo.

dialogue.en: Thanks. This gathering is going to be really special.
dialogue.r: Gomawoyo. Ibeon moim, jeongmal teukbyeolhal geoyeyo.

yourTurn.en: Are we all getting together in one place?
I want to recall every moment we shared.
I'll prepare with my whole heart.

dialogue.en: Everyone's arriving one by one!
dialogue.r: Dadeul hanadulssik dochakhago isseoyo!

dialogue.en: Marco! Did you come straight here after finishing bakery work?
dialogue.lit: Marco! Bakery work finishing-and right-away came?
dialogue.r: Marco! Ppangjip il kkeunnaego baro wasseoyo?

dialogue.en: Yes! I brought plenty of bread for everyone too.
dialogue.lit: Yes! Everyone for bread-also full brought.
dialogue.r: Ne! Dadeul wihaeseo ppangdo gadeuk gajyeowasseoyo.

dialogue.t: —준호 씨, 소연 씨! 둘이 정말 행복해 보여요.
dialogue.en: Junho, Soyeon! You two look really happy.
dialogue.lit: Junho Mr/Ms, Soyeon Mr/Ms! Two really happy look.
dialogue.r: Junho ssi, Soyeon ssi! Duri jeongmal haengbokhae boyeoyo.

dialogue.en: Thanks. Looking at the photo album, I'm sinking into old memories.
dialogue.lit: Thanks. Photo-album seeing-because old memory-into sinking.
dialogue.r: Gomawoyo. Sajincheop bonikka yet chueoge jamgineyo.

dialogue.t: —이 사진 봐요! 처음 만났을 때 그 모습 그대로예요.
dialogue.en: Look at this photo! It's exactly how we looked when we first met.
dialogue.lit: This photo look! First met-time that appearance exactly-as-is.
dialogue.r: I sajin bwayo! Cheoeum mannasseul ttae geu moseup geudaeroyeyo.

dialogue.t: —시간이 멈춘 것 같아요. 그런데 우리는 더 성장했어요.
dialogue.en: It feels like time stopped. But we've grown more.
dialogue.lit: Time-subject stopped seems. But we-as-for more grew.
dialogue.r: Sigani meomchun geot gatayo. Geureonde urineun deo seongjanghaesseoyo.

dialogue.t: —맞아요. 다들 정말 많이 변했어요. 그런데 마음은 그대로예요.
dialogue.en: Right. Everyone's changed a lot. But our hearts stayed the same.
dialogue.lit: Correct. All-of-you really a-lot changed. But heart-as-for exactly-as-is.
dialogue.r: Majayo. Dadeul jeongmal mani byeonhaesseoyo. Geureonde maeumeun geudaeroyeyo.

dialogue.t: —내일 모임이 정말 기대돼요. 다 준비 완료됐어요.
dialogue.en: I'm really looking forward to tomorrow's gathering. Everything's fully prepared.
dialogue.lit: Tomorrow gathering-subject really looked-forward-to. All preparation complete-became.
dialogue.r: Naeil moimi jeongmal gidaedwaeyo. Da junbi wallyodwaesseoyo.

dialogue.en: I just feel grateful to everyone. See you all tomorrow!
dialogue.lit: All-of-you really thankful heart-only-is. Tomorrow see!
dialogue.r: Dadeul jeongmal gamsahan maeumppuni-eyo. Naeil bwayo!

yourTurn.en: Everyone's arriving one by one!

yourTurn.t: 시간이 멈춘 것 같아요. 그런데 우리는 더 성장했어요.
yourTurn.en: It feels like time stopped. But we've grown more.
I just feel grateful to everyone.

dialogue.t: —드디어 백 번째 모임이에요! 다들 와 줘서 고마워요.
dialogue.en: Finally, this is our hundredth gathering! Thank you all for coming.
dialogue.lit: Finally hundred-th gathering-is! All-of-you came-give-so thanks.
dialogue.r: Deudieo baek beonjjae moimieyo! Dadeul wa jwoseo gomawoyo.

dialogue.en: Marco! I really wanted you with us even just by video. Can you hear us?
dialogue.r: Marco! Yeongsangeurorado kkok hamkkehago sipeosseoyo. Deullyeoyo?

dialogue.t: —여기 있어요! 빵집 마감하고 화면으로 같이 있어요.
dialogue.en: I'm here! I closed up the bakery and I'm with you all on the screen.
dialogue.lit: Here am! Bakery closing-and screen-by together am.
dialogue.r: Yeogi isseoyo! Ppangjip magamhago hwamyeoneuro gachi isseoyo.

dialogue.t: —처음 만났을 때부터 지금까지, 정말 먼 길을 함께 걸어왔어요.
dialogue.en: From the moment we first met until now, we've truly walked a long road together.
dialogue.lit: First met-time-from now-until, really far road-object together walked-came.
dialogue.r: Cheoeum mannasseul ttaebuteo jigeumkkaji, jeongmal meon gireul hamkke georeowasseoyo.

dialogue.t: —맞아요. 빵 때문에 싸운 적도 있고, 떠났다가 돌아오기도 했고.
dialogue.en: Right. We even fought because of bread, and you left and came back too.
dialogue.lit: Correct. Bread because-of fought time-also have-and, left-and-then returned-also did-and.
dialogue.r: Majayo. Ppang ttaemune ssaun jeokdo itgo, tteonatdaga dorawogido haetgo.

dialogue.en: We achieved dreams, found love, and even opened a bakery.
dialogue.lit: Dream-object achieving, love-also finding, bakery-even opened.
dialogue.r: Kkumeul irugo, sarangdo chatgo, ppangjipkkaji yeoreonneyo.

dialogue.t: —이 모든 고마운 시간들, 평생 잊지 못할 거예요.
dialogue.en: All these grateful moments — I'll never be able to forget them my whole life.
dialogue.lit: This all thankful times, lifetime forget couldn't will-be.
dialogue.r: I modeun gomaun sigandeul, pyeongsaeng itji motal geoyeyo.

dialogue.t: —이건 끝이 아니라 시작이에요. 우리 이야기는 계속돼요.
dialogue.en: This isn't an ending, it's a beginning. Our story continues.
dialogue.lit: This end not-but start-is. We story-as-for continues.
dialogue.r: Igeon kkeuchi anira sijagieyo. Uri iyagineun gyesokdwaeyo.

dialogue.t: —맞아요! 언제나 서로 곁에 있을 거예요. 거리는 상관없어요.
dialogue.en: Right! We'll always be by each other's side. Distance doesn't matter.
dialogue.lit: Correct! Always each-other side-at will-be. Distance-as-for doesn't-matter.
dialogue.r: Majayo! Eonjena seoro gyeote isseul geoyeyo. Georineun sanggwaneopseoyo.

dialogue.t: —이 순간을 영원히 기억해요. 우리는 친구가 아니라 가족이에요!
dialogue.en: Let's remember this moment forever. We're not just friends, we're family!
dialogue.lit: This moment-object forever remember. We-as-for friend not-but family-is!
dialogue.r: I sunganeul yeongwonhi gieokhaeyo. Urineun chinguga anira gajogieyo!

yourTurn.t: 드디어 백 번째 모임이에요! 다들 와 줘서 고마워요.
yourTurn.en: Finally, this is our hundredth gathering! Thank you all for coming.

yourTurn.t: 이건 끝이 아니라 시작이에요. 우리 이야기는 계속돼요.
yourTurn.en: This isn't an ending, it's a beginning. Our story continues.
We're not just friends, we're family!
